summary: Classify 489 real Foundry-SRD monster features into a trigger→effect automation catalog for ddb-roll-cards
logs: Classifying 489 real SRD monster features (20 batches) into trigger→effect specs

recommendedFirst.name: Bite
recommendedFirst.why: Most common attack rider in the whole game (conf 0.98). onHit + damage is the densest automatable pattern (20 'yes', 26 total). Reuses the existing onHit/hit-confirmed + damage-applied hooks with zero new plumbing — this is the template every weapon-attack card copies.

recommendedFirst.name: Grab
recommendedFirst.why: Grappled-on-hit is ubiquitous (conf 0.90). onHit + condition has 12 fully-automatable entries (Pincer, Ram, Gouge, Paralyzing Touch all share this shape). Uses existing onHit hook; just apply a condition instead of damage.

recommendedFirst.name: Burning Hammer
recommendedFirst.why: Canonical bonus-element-damage-on-hit (fire rider). Stands in for the large Heated Weapons / Hellish Weapons / Angelic Weapons / Withering family. Existing onHit + damage-applied hooks; proves the multi-damage-type rider path.

recommendedFirst.name: Acid Breath
recommendedFirst.why: activeAction + forceSave with 12 'yes'. GM clicks the card, it pushes a Dex save and applies half-on-success damage. Leans entirely on the existing save-resolved hook. Bread-and-butter AoE.

recommendedFirst.name: Fiery Bolt
recommendedFirst.why: Represents the single largest bucket in the catalog: activeAction + damage (64 'yes', 77 total). A plain targeted-damage card. No hook needed beyond the card firing; uses damage-applied. Implementing this unlocks dozens of near-identical attacks at once.

recommendedFirst.name: Regeneration
recommendedFirst.why: The one fully-automatable turnStart/heal (conf 0.85). We ALREADY have the turnStart hook (used for recurring burn damage) — flipping the sign to heal is nearly free and covers a high-frequency monster trait (trolls, etc.).

recommendedFirst.name: Fire Breath
recommendedFirst.why: Dragon/elemental breath is one of the highest table-frequency abilities. recharge is the best new-hook investment: 15 features, 9 fully automatable, all the same save-for-half shape. The save resolution itself reuses save-resolved; only the recharge-roll gate is new.

recommendedFirst.name: Cold Breath
recommendedFirst.why: Second breath-weapon variant (damage-direct rather than save). Ships alongside Fire Breath at near-zero marginal cost once the recharge gate exists, and validates both recharge sub-shapes (save vs. flat damage).

recommendedFirst.name: Corrosive Form
recommendedFirst.why: Explicitly requested. Retaliation damage when a melee attacker hits the monster (oozes corroding weapons/dealing acid back). Needs the new onBeingHitMelee hook, which also unlocks Heated Body, Riposte, Mucous Cloud — a tight, high-value cluster. Marked 'partial' because the item-corrosion side needs weapon data DDB may not expose, but the damage-back half is automatable now.

recommendedFirst.name: Heated Body
recommendedFirst.why: The fully-automatable ('yes', conf 0.85) sibling of Corrosive Form — pure fire damage to anyone who melee-hits the creature, no item dependency. Best proof case for the onBeingHitMelee hook; implement it first to validate, then layer Corrosive Form on top.

recommendedFirst.name: Fire Absorption
recommendedFirst.why: Clean, fully-automatable (conf 0.90): when the creature takes fire damage, heal instead. Needs the new onDamaged hook (inspects incoming damage type), which also covers Lightning Absorption and feeds Undead Fortitude / Rampage later. High wow-factor, small surface.

recommendedFirst.name: Death Burst
recommendedFirst.why: The single fully-automatable onDeath effect (conf 0.82): explode for AoE save-or-damage when reduced to 0. Justifies the onDeath hook on its own; pairs with save-resolved. Note most other onDeath entries are GM-narrative 'Restoration' and intentionally excluded.

needNewHooks: recharge — unlocks 15 features (9 fully automatable), all high-frequency breath weapons sharing one save-for-half shape; highest ROI new hook by far
onDamaged — unlocks 13 features; cleanest wins are the Absorption family (Fire/Lightning Absorption heal on matching damage type), plus enables Undead Fortitude, Rampage, Multiple Heads later
reaction — unlocks 12 features (Parry, Deflect Missile, Protection); mostly AC/damage-reduction interrupts, only 'partial' automatable, needs an interrupt point in the attack pipeline
onBeingHit — unlocks 8 features (Corrode Metal, Rust Metal, Blurred Form); fires when the creature is hit regardless of melee/ranged; overlaps conceptually with onBeingHitMelee
onDeath — unlocks 16 features but only 2 are automatable (Death Burst, Death Throes); the other 14 are Restoration/Rejuvenation/summon GM-narrative effects, so low automation yield despite the count
aura — unlocks 7 features (Fear Aura, Stench, Petrifying Gaze); all 'partial' — needs a per-turn proximity/range check against other tokens, which is the most engineering-heavy hook here
onBeingHitMelee — unlocks 4 features (Corrosive Form, Heated Body, Riposte, Mucous Cloud) but includes the requested Corrosive Form; a melee-only specialization of onBeingHit
onMove — unlocks only 2 (Fire Form, Water Susceptibility); lowest priority, needs movement-event interception for marginal payoff
haveHooks: activeAction — the base 'GM clicks the roll card' path; 236 features (largest bucket). Its automatable effects (activeAction+damage = 64 yes, activeAction+forceSave = 12 yes, activeAction+condition = 12 yes) settle onto the existing damage-applied and save-resolved plumbing, so no hook is needed beyond firing the card

onHit — 61 features; covers the entire weapon-attack-rider catalog. onHit+damage (20 yes) and onHit+condition (12 yes) are the two densest automatable patterns after activeAction. Already wired as hit-confirmed

turnStart — 10 features; already used for recurring condition damage (Burning). Directly covers Regeneration (heal) and Barbed Hide (damage); the recurring-tick machinery is reusable for any turn-start effect
damage-applied — not a feature trigger itself but the effect-side hook that every '+damage' card (121 features, the largest effect bucket) routes through; already present

save-resolved — the effect-side hook behind every 'forceSave' card (58 features); already present and is what makes activeAction+forceSave and recharge breath weapons automatable without new save plumbing
summary.notes: Honest caveats. (1) DDB data gaps: 'partial' very often means the roll/damage half is automatable but a secondary clause depends on data ddb-game-log doesn't reliably emit. Examples: Corrosive Form / Corrode Metal / Rust Metal need the *attacker's weapon* metadata to degrade it; grapple/restrain riders (Grab, Constrict) need the target's escape-save DC and ongoing tracking; Absorption/Undead Fortitude need the *incoming damage type and amount*, which DDB sends for the triggering roll but not always in a parseable form. (2) 'onDeath' is a frequency trap — 16 features but 14 are Restoration/Rejuvenation/Soul-Jar narrative effects (creature comes back later, GM adjudicates) that are correctly marked 'no'; do not be lured by the raw count. (3) Spellcasting / Innate Spellcasting / Change Shape / Shapechanger are 'no' or low-confidence 'partial' — they fan out into entire spell lists or stat-block swaps and shouldn't be a single card. (4) 'aura' and 'reaction' look tempting but every entry is 'partial': auras need per-turn range checks against other tokens (real engineering), and reactions need an interrupt point in the attack-resolution pipeline plus a usage-economy tracker. (5) Ambiguous duplicates exist in the source (Adhesive vs 'Adhesive (Object Form Only)'; Vampire Weakness vs Vampire Weaknesses; Mucus Cloud vs Mucous Cloud; First/Second/Third Roar) — dedupe before building cards. (6) Multiattack (conf 0.72, 'partial') is structurally a container that fires other cards, not an effect itself — treat it as orchestration, not a leaf automation. (7) recharge automation only covers the *effect*; whether the GM wants auto-rolled recharge vs. manual is a UX choice — gate it behind a setting.

catalog.name: Abduct
catalog.triggerDetail: needn't spend extra movement to move a grappled creature
catalog.effectDetail: movement-cost waiver while grappling; no rules state the card pipeline touches
catalog.notes: Pure movement-economy modifier resolved on the GM's grid/VTT side, not in a roll card. The pipeline has no knowledge of movement budgets or grapple-drag costs.

catalog.name: Aberrant Ground
catalog.triggerDetail: Difficult Terrain in an Emanation around the monster
catalog.effectDetail: creates Difficult Terrain in an aura
catalog.notes: Terrain effect tied to an emanation template. Not a condition/damage/save; the pipeline can't apply 'difficult terrain' to map squares. GM/VTT handles terrain.

catalog.name: Abyssal Glaive
catalog.triggerDetail: [[/attack]] then [[/damage]]
catalog.effectDetail: weapon attack roll + damage on hit
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM target selection; hit/miss confirm
catalog.notes: Standard weapon attack item — exactly the attack+hit+damage flow the pipeline owns. Damage type is carried by the item.

catalog.name: Acid Absorption
catalog.triggerDetail: whenever subjected to Acid damage
catalog.effectDetail: negates the Acid damage and heals HP equal to it
catalog.notes: Pipeline knows damage applied and its type. It can zero out incoming Acid (resistance/immunity-style) and convert it to healing of equal amount. Acid-immunity zeroing is clean; the heal-for-equal step may need a hook beyond plain resistance handling.

catalog.name: Acid Breath
catalog.triggerDetail: Dexterity save in a Line, half on success
catalog.effectDetail: Dex save vs DC; fail = full damage, success = half
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM target selection (creatures in the Line)
catalog.notes: Save-for-half AoE damage. Pipeline forces the save, knows pass/fail, applies resistance-aware damage. Note this entry has no recharge text in desc (the action itself), so triggered as the active breath action.

catalog.name: Acid Spray
catalog.triggerDetail: Dexterity save in a template, half on success
catalog.effectDetail: Dex save vs DC; fail = full damage, success = half
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM target selection (creatures in the template)
catalog.notes: Same shape as Acid Breath: save-for-half AoE damage, fully within the force-save + resistance-aware-damage pipeline.

catalog.name: Adhesive (Object Form Only)
catalog.triggerDetail: adheres to anything that touches it; toucher is Grappled
catalog.effectDetail: applies Grappled (escape DC) to a Huge-or-smaller creature that touches it
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM confirm which creature touched/attacked in melee
catalog.notes: Touch is best detected as a melee attack against this creature (onBeingHitMelee). Pipeline can apply Grappled; the escape-check Disadvantage and 'anything that touches' (not just attacks) are nuances the GM may need to trigger manually.

catalog.name: Agile
catalog.triggerDetail: doesn't provoke Opportunity Attacks when leaving reach
catalog.effectDetail: suppresses opportunity attacks against this creature
catalog.notes: Movement/reaction-economy rule. The roll-card pipeline doesn't model opportunity-attack provocation; GM/VTT handles this.

catalog.name: Air Form
catalog.triggerDetail: can enter enemy space and move through a 1-inch gap
catalog.effectDetail: squeeze/space-sharing movement allowance
catalog.notes: Movement-positioning trait with no roll, condition, or damage. Outside the card pipeline; resolved on the map.

catalog.name: Amorphous
catalog.triggerDetail: can move through a 1-inch space without extra movement
catalog.effectDetail: squeeze movement allowance
catalog.notes: Pure movement trait, no rolls. Not automatable through a roll-card pipeline.

catalog.name: Amphibious
catalog.triggerDetail: can breathe air and water
catalog.effectDetail: breathing trait, no mechanical roll
catalog.notes: Flavor/environment trait with no roll, save, damage, or condition. Nothing for the pipeline to do.

catalog.name: Animate Trees
catalog.triggerDetail: magically animates up to two trees as Treants
catalog.effectDetail: creates/animates up to two tree allies using the Treant stat block
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM picks which trees, places tokens, manages duration
catalog.notes: Summon/creation of new combatants with their own stat block, initiative slot, and 1-day/leash duration. The roll-card pipeline doesn't spawn tokens; this is a GM/VTT operation.

catalog.name: Antennae
catalog.triggerDetail: targets worn/carried armor or weapon; Dex save
catalog.effectDetail: fail = -1 penalty to armor AC or weapon attack rolls; armor destroyed at AC 10, weapon destroyed at -5
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM picks which armor/weapon object on the target
catalog.notes: Force-save + debuffItem (and conditional destroyItem at thresholds) — squarely in the pipeline's wheelhouse. Partial because the desc's Foundry Note says the cumulative Damaged Enchantment must be hand-dragged onto the target item; stacking and the destroy-threshold tracking aren't fully hands-off.

catalog.name: Aquatic Charge
catalog.triggerDetail: swims up to Swim Speed straight toward an enemy
catalog.effectDetail: approach movement toward an enemy
catalog.notes: Pure movement action (a Bonus-Action-style reposition); no roll/save/damage in the desc. Map/VTT handles it, not the card pipeline.

catalog.name: Arcane Burst
catalog.triggerDetail: [[/attack]] then [[/damage]]
catalog.effectDetail: ranged spell/weapon attack roll + damage on hit
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM target selection; hit/miss confirm
catalog.notes: Standard attack item (attack+damage). Damage type carried by the item; fully automatable attack-roll flow.

catalog.name: Arcane Prowl
catalog.triggerDetail: teleport up to N feet, then make one Claw attack
catalog.effectDetail: self-teleport to a visible unoccupied space, plus a Claw attack
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM picks/confirms teleport destination
catalog.notes: Composite: the teleport (movement/positioning) is GM-driven on the map, but the bundled Claw attack runs through the normal attack pipeline. Attack half is automatable; teleport half is not.

catalog.name: Attach
catalog.triggerDetail: [[/attack]]/[[/damage]]; on hit attaches and applies Blinded
catalog.effectDetail: attack + damage; on hit (Large or smaller) target gains Blinded; ongoing shared/halved damage and a Str (Athletics) check to detach
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM confirms target size category for the attach rider
catalog.notes: The attack+damage+onHit-Blinded portion is automatable (pipeline knows hit and can apply a condition). The persistent 'halve damage taken / target takes the same' bookkeeping and the detach DC check are ongoing state the GM tracks, so only partial.

catalog.name: Aura of Authority
catalog.triggerDetail: allies in Emanation get Advantage on attacks and saves
catalog.effectDetail: Advantage to monster and allies on attack rolls and saving throws while in the aura (unless Incapacitated)
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM confirms which tokens are inside the emanation
catalog.notes: An always-on positional buff, not triggered per roll-card. The pipeline could grant Advantage to affected attack/save rolls if it knew aura membership and the monster's Incapacitated state, but membership is positional and the buff also affects allies' own rolls, so it's GM-mediated at best.

catalog.name: Aversion to Fire
catalog.triggerDetail: if it takes Fire damage, Disadvantage until end of next turn
catalog.effectDetail: self-debuff: Disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks until end of next turn
catalog.notes: Pipeline knows damage type (Fire) and turn boundaries, so it can detect the trigger and flag the Disadvantage window. Effect is really a self-applied condition-like debuff (Disadvantage), not item damage; applying/expiring an active effect for the duration may need a hook. Labeled debuffItem only as the closest enum to a stat debuff.

catalog.name: Baleful Command
catalog.triggerDetail: Wisdom save in an Emanation; fail = damage + Frightened + Incapacitated
catalog.effectDetail: Wis save vs DC; fail = damage and Frightened + Incapacitated until start of monster's next turn
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM target selection (creatures in the Emanation)
catalog.notes: Force-save AoE that deals damage and applies two conditions on failure with a clear turn-based duration — all within the pipeline (save pass/fail, damage, condition application, turn-start expiry).

catalog.name: Banish
catalog.triggerDetail: Charisma save; fail = damage + Incapacitated + transported to demiplane
catalog.effectDetail: Cha save vs DC; fail = damage, Incapacitated, and removed to a demiplane until start of monster's next turn, then reappears; recharge-style lockout
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM places the target's reappearance space; manage off-board token
catalog.notes: The save, damage, and Incapacitated condition are automatable. The banishment/teleport to a demiplane and the controlled reappearance within range are positional token operations the GM must handle, plus the 'can't take this action again' lockout — so partial.

catalog.name: Barbed Hide
catalog.triggerDetail: at the start of each of its turns, deals damage to a creature [grappled/attached to it]
catalog.effectDetail: automatic damage to any creature grappled by / adhered to it at turn start
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM confirms which creature is currently grappled/attached
catalog.notes: Pipeline fires on turnStart and can apply resistance-aware automatic damage. Partial because it must know which creature is currently in the grappled/attached state (the [[lookup ... special]] target), which is GM-tracked state rather than something the card knows.

catalog.name: Beak
catalog.triggerDetail: [[/attack]] then [[/damage]]
catalog.effectDetail: weapon attack roll + damage on hit
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM target selection; hit/miss confirm
catalog.notes: Plain weapon attack item; standard attack+damage pipeline flow.

catalog.name: Beaks
catalog.triggerDetail: [[/attack]]/[[/damage]], or alternate damage if a condition is met
catalog.effectDetail: weapon attack with a conditional damage variant
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM confirms the conditional-damage condition (e.g. target state)
catalog.notes: Standard attack with a conditional damage branch ([[lookup @activation.condition]]). Attack+damage is automatable; the GM/pipeline just needs to confirm which damage line applies.

catalog.name: Beard
catalog.triggerDetail: [[/attack]]/[[/damage]]; on hit target Poisoned
catalog.effectDetail: attack + damage; on hit applies Poisoned until start of monster's next turn and prevents HP regain while poisoned
catalog.notes: Attack, damage, and on-hit Poisoned with a turn-start expiry are all automatable. The rider 'can't regain Hit Points' while poisoned is an extra clause the pipeline doesn't natively enforce on healing, so partial rather than full.

catalog.name: Beast of Burden
catalog.triggerDetail: counts as one size larger for carrying capacity
catalog.effectDetail: narrative carrying-capacity boost; no combat mechanic
catalog.notes: Pure flavor/encumbrance modifier outside the roll-card pipeline. Nothing to apply on any combat event.

catalog.name: Beguile
catalog.triggerDetail: casts Command, no components, Cha DC
catalog.effectDetail: casts Command spell (Wis save vs one-word command); recharges start of next turn
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM picks the one-word command; resolve Command's effect manually
catalog.notes: Pipeline can fire the spell item and force the save, but Command's outcome depends on the chosen word and is GM-adjudicated. 'Can't act again until start of next turn' is a once-per-round lockout to track.

catalog.name: Berserk
catalog.triggerDetail: starts its turn Bloodied, roll 1d6, on a 6 goes berserk
catalog.effectDetail: forced behavior — attacks nearest creature/object; creator can calm via DC 15 Cha (Persuasion)
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM confirms Bloodied state, rolls/judges nearest target, and adjudicates the creator's calming check
catalog.notes: Trigger (turnStart while Bloodied) and the 1d6 roll are automatable, but the effect is AI/behavioral targeting plus a contested social check the pipeline can't resolve. Best surfaced as a GM prompt.

catalog.name: Bite
catalog.triggerDetail: /attack extended; /damage average extended
catalog.effectDetail: standard weapon attack, single damage instance
catalog.notes: Vanilla weapon item. Attack roll, hit/miss, resistance-aware damage all in-pipeline.

catalog.name: Bites
catalog.triggerDetail: /damage average extended, or alt damage if activation.condition
catalog.effectDetail: weapon attack with a conditional second damage profile
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM confirms whether the activation condition is met to select the alternate damage
catalog.notes: Base attack is fully automatable; the 'or X if <condition>' branch needs the GM to assert the condition (e.g. target prone/grappled) before the right damage formula is applied.

catalog.name: Bladed Arm
catalog.triggerDetail: /attack extended; /damage average extended
catalog.effectDetail: standard weapon attack, single damage instance
catalog.notes: Plain weapon item; no rider.

catalog.name: Blazing Light
catalog.triggerDetail: uses Spellcasting to cast Scorching Ray
catalog.effectDetail: casts Scorching Ray — multiple ranged spell attacks, fire damage
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM assigns each ray to a target; confirm ranged spell-attack hits
catalog.notes: Effect is 'damage' via spell-attack rolls rather than a save, but it's really a delegated spell. Pipeline can launch the Scorching Ray item; GM distributes the rays among targets.

catalog.name: Blinding Breath
catalog.triggerDetail: Dex save, each creature in a Cone
catalog.effectDetail: on fail: Blinded until end of monster's next turn
catalog.notes: GM targets the cone, pipeline forces Dex saves and applies Blinded with a turn-end duration. 'apply=false' just means the system won't auto-apply, but the pipeline can.

catalog.name: Blinding Gaze
catalog.triggerDetail: Con save, one creature within range
catalog.effectDetail: on fail: Blinded for 1 minute; recharges start of next turn
catalog.notes: Single-target forced save → Blinded (1 min). Once-per-round lockout to track regardless of save result.

catalog.name: Blinding Spittle
catalog.triggerDetail: Dex save, each creature in a radius Sphere
catalog.effectDetail: on fail: damage + Blinded until end of monster's next turn
catalog.notes: AoE forced save dealing damage plus applying Blinded on failure. Both halves are in-pipeline (damage applied, condition applied).

catalog.name: Blood Frenzy
catalog.triggerDetail: Advantage vs any creature not at full HP
catalog.effectDetail: advantage on attack rolls vs damaged targets
catalog.inputsNeeded: Confirm/track each target's current-vs-max HP at attack time
catalog.notes: Pipeline sees damage applied, so it can know a target is below max HP and grant advantage on this creature's attacks — but it must be evaluated per-target at roll time.

catalog.name: Bloodied Frenzy
catalog.triggerDetail: while Bloodied: Advantage on attacks and saves
catalog.effectDetail: advantage on attack rolls and saving throws while Bloodied
catalog.inputsNeeded: Track Bloodied (≤ half HP) state of this creature
catalog.notes: Conditional self-buff gated on Bloodied. Pipeline tracks HP/damage so it can detect Bloodied and apply advantage to the creature's own rolls.

catalog.name: Bloodied Fury
catalog.triggerDetail: while Bloodied: Advantage on attacks
catalog.effectDetail: advantage on attack rolls while Bloodied
catalog.inputsNeeded: Track Bloodied state of this creature
catalog.notes: Narrower version of Bloodied Frenzy (attacks only). Same Bloodied detection from applied damage.

catalog.name: Blurred Form
catalog.triggerDetail: attacks against it have Disadvantage unless Incapacitated
catalog.effectDetail: imposes Disadvantage on incoming attack rolls (self-defense)
catalog.inputsNeeded: Confirm the creature is not Incapacitated when targeted
catalog.notes: Defensive modifier applied to attackers' rolls against this creature; suppressed while Incapacitated. Applies at attack-resolution time rather than truly 'on being hit'.

catalog.name: Bone Bow
catalog.triggerDetail: /attack extended; /damage average extended
catalog.effectDetail: standard ranged weapon attack
catalog.notes: Plain weapon item; no rider.

catalog.name: Bone Cudgel
catalog.triggerDetail: /attack extended; /damage average extended
catalog.effectDetail: standard melee weapon attack
catalog.notes: Plain weapon item; no rider.

catalog.name: Boulder
catalog.triggerDetail: weapon attack; if target Large or smaller it is Prone
catalog.effectDetail: damage plus Prone on a Large-or-smaller target (on hit)
catalog.notes: Weapon hit deals damage and applies Prone gated on target size; pipeline knows the target token's size and can apply Prone automatically on a hit.

catalog.name: Boulder Toss
catalog.triggerDetail: Dex save, each creature in a radius Sphere; half on success
catalog.effectDetail: on fail: damage + Prone (Large or smaller); success: half damage
catalog.notes: AoE forced save with half-on-success damage and a size-gated Prone on failure. Damage, half-damage, and Prone are all in-pipeline.

catalog.name: Bound
catalog.triggerDetail: amulet wearer takes damage within 60 ft → half transferred to monster
catalog.effectDetail: redirects half of the wearer's damage (round up) onto this creature
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM identifies/links the amulet wearer and confirms within 60 ft and same plane
catalog.notes: The damage-transfer mechanic could be applied if the wearer link and proximity were known, but the pipeline has no concept of the amulet binding, so it needs explicit GM setup. Telepathic-summon half is pure narrative.

catalog.name: Bubble Dash
catalog.triggerDetail: while underwater, moves up to Swim Speed without provoking Opportunity Attacks
catalog.effectDetail: Disengage-like dash underwater (no Opportunity Attacks)
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM moves the token; suppress any opportunity-attack reactions
catalog.notes: Movement is physically done by the GM on the canvas; the pipeline doesn't drive token movement or opportunity-attack provocation, so there's nothing for it to apply.

catalog.name: Burn
catalog.triggerDetail: weapon attack; flammable target/object starts burning
catalog.effectDetail: damage plus 'burning' ongoing-fire state on a hit
catalog.inputsNeeded: Confirm target is a creature/flammable object; burning is a custom (non-core) condition
catalog.notes: Damage is automatable. 'Burning' is the SRD 5.2 hazard (1d4 fire at turn start until extinguished), not a standard 5e condition, so applying/tracking it depends on the module supporting a custom burning effect.

catalog.name: Burning Hammer
catalog.triggerDetail: /attack extended; /damage average extended
catalog.effectDetail: standard weapon attack (fire damage baked into formula)
catalog.notes: Despite the fiery name, desc is a plain attack+damage with no rider condition. Resistance-aware damage handles the fire component.

catalog.name: Burst of Ingenuity
catalog.triggerDetail: Trigger: self or creature within range makes an ability check or save → add 2 to the roll
catalog.effectDetail: reaction that adds +2 to an ability check or saving throw
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM decides whether to spend the reaction and on which roll
catalog.notes: Reaction tied to another creature's check/save. Pipeline knows save results and can apply a flat +2, but the choice to use it (and on which roll) is a GM decision; ability checks especially are often outside the card flow.

catalog.name: Cacophony
catalog.triggerDetail: Wis save, one creature in the monster's space
catalog.effectDetail: on fail: Deafened until start of monster's next turn, plus Disadvantage on ability checks & attack rolls while Deafened
catalog.notes: Forced Wis save applying Deafened with a turn-start duration; the attached Disadvantage rider can be bundled into the applied effect. Fully in-pipeline.

catalog.name: Captain's Charm
catalog.triggerDetail: Wis save, one creature within range the monster can see
catalog.effectDetail: on fail: Charmed until start of monster's next turn
catalog.notes: Single-target forced Wis save → Charmed with turn-start duration. Straightforward forceSave + condition application.

catalog.name: Celestial Restoration
catalog.triggerDetail: If the monster dies, it returns to life in 1d6 days
catalog.effectDetail: Returns to life after 1d6 days and regains all HP unless Dispel Evil and Good is cast on remains
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM ruling on whether Dispel Evil and Good was cast on the remains; revival happens days later, off the combat timeline
catalog.notes: Out-of-combat narrative revival keyed to in-game days. Pipeline has no concept of multi-day timers or the Dispel-Evil exception; pure GM fiat.

catalog.name: Chain
catalog.triggerDetail: If the target is a Large or smaller creature (on a hit)
catalog.effectDetail: Attack + damage, then Grappled (escape DC = passive Athletics) and Restrained until grapple ends
catalog.inputsNeeded: Confirm target is Large or smaller before applying conditions
catalog.notes: Weapon attack is fully in-pipeline (attacker, item, hit, damage). Conditions are applicable, but the size gate and grapple-end/escape tracking need GM/manual handling.

catalog.name: Channel Negative Energy
catalog.triggerDetail: [[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]]
catalog.effectDetail: Standard weapon attack with damage
catalog.notes: Plain attack+damage with no rider. Exactly the core loop: attacker, weapon item, hit/miss, resistance-aware damage.

catalog.name: Charge
catalog.triggerDetail: moves up to [special] straight toward an enemy it can see
catalog.effectDetail: Monster moves toward an enemy
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM moves the token; no target/hit/damage event for the pipeline to hook
catalog.notes: Pure repositioning of the monster's own token. Pipeline is built around attacks/saves/damage on GM-targeted tokens, not self-movement.

catalog.name: Charged Tendril
catalog.triggerDetail: If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, pulls the target 5 feet toward itself
catalog.effectDetail: Attack + damage, then forced 5-ft pull of the target
catalog.inputsNeeded: Confirm target is Medium or smaller; GM/manual performs the 5-ft pull
catalog.notes: Attack and damage are automatable. Forced movement of the target token isn't in the listed effect set; GM nudges the token.

catalog.name: Charging Horn
catalog.triggerDetail: moves up to half its Speed without provoking, and makes one Radiant Horn attack
catalog.effectDetail: Move (no opportunity attacks) plus one Radiant Horn attack
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM performs the movement; pipeline then runs the referenced Radiant Horn attack item
catalog.notes: The bundled Radiant Horn attack is automatable as a normal item attack; the movement half is GM-driven. No-opportunity-attack clause is just rules text.

catalog.name: Charm
catalog.triggerDetail: casts Charm Person, save DC = cha.dc, Charmed; target is willing recipient of Bite
catalog.effectDetail: Forces save, applies Charmed; Bite damage doesn't end the spell; target unaware afterward
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets the creature; on fail, GM/pipeline applies Charmed and tracks the special 'Bite doesn't break it' / unaware-on-end clauses
catalog.notes: Spell-as-feature: force save + apply Charmed condition is in-pipeline. The bespoke rider (damage doesn't end spell, target unaware) and duration tracking need manual handling.

catalog.name: Chill
catalog.triggerDetail: casts Hold Monster; can't take this action again until start of next turn
catalog.effectDetail: Casts Hold Monster (Paralyzed on failed save, repeat saves)
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets creature; force the Wisdom save and apply Paralyzed on fail; ongoing repeat-save/concentration tracking is manual
catalog.notes: Initial save + Paralyzed application is automatable, but Hold Monster requires concentration and end-of-turn repeat saves the pipeline doesn't track. Recharge-style self-limit is just text.

catalog.name: Claw
catalog.triggerDetail: [[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]]
catalog.effectDetail: Standard weapon attack with damage
catalog.notes: Vanilla attack+damage, no rider. Fully covered by the core hit/damage loop.

catalog.name: Claws
catalog.triggerDetail: If the target is a Large or smaller creature (on a hit)
catalog.effectDetail: Attack + damage, then Grappled (escape DC = passive Athletics) and Restrained until grapple ends
catalog.inputsNeeded: Confirm target is Large or smaller; grapple-end/escape tracking is manual
catalog.notes: Same shape as Chain/Claws grapple riders: attack+damage automatable, conditions applicable, size gate + grapple lifecycle need GM.

catalog.name: Cloaked Flight
catalog.triggerDetail: casts Invisibility on itself and flies up to half its Fly Speed
catalog.effectDetail: Self-Invisibility (Invisible condition) plus self-movement
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM moves the token; applying self Invisible/Invisibility could be manual
catalog.notes: A self-buff with no target, no save, no damage. Pipeline is target/hit/save-oriented; self-condition could be auto-applied but movement and concentration are GM-side.

catalog.name: Cloud of Insects
catalog.triggerDetail: Dexterity Saving Throw, one creature within range; Failure: damage + Disadvantage on Concentration saves
catalog.effectDetail: Dex save; on fail, damage and Disadvantage on Concentration saves until end of its next turn
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets the creature; the 'Disadvantage on Concentration saves' debuff and its duration need manual tracking
catalog.notes: Save + resistance-aware damage on a GM-targeted token is core-loop. The conditional Concentration-save Disadvantage isn't a standard condition the pipeline applies.

catalog.name: Cold Breath
catalog.triggerDetail: Constitution Saving Throw, each target in a Cone; Failure: damage, Success: half
catalog.effectDetail: Con save vs cone; full damage on fail, half on success
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets the creatures in the cone
catalog.notes: Classic breath weapon. Force Con save per GM-targeted token, apply full/half resistance-aware damage by pass/fail. Squarely in-pipeline.

catalog.name: Cold Gale
catalog.triggerDetail: Dexterity Saving Throw, each creature in a Line; Failure: damage + pushed 30 ft, Success: half
catalog.effectDetail: Dex save vs line; fail = damage + 30-ft push, success = half damage
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets line creatures; the 30-ft forced push on failed saves is GM-performed
catalog.notes: Save + full/half damage is automatable; the forced-movement push on fail is outside the standard effect set and needs GM to reposition tokens.

catalog.name: Commanding Presence
catalog.triggerDetail: casts Command (level 2 version); can't take again until start of next turn
catalog.effectDetail: Casts Command (Wis save; one-word command compels behavior)
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets creatures and forces the Wis save; the GM must adjudicate the chosen command's behavioral effect
catalog.notes: Save itself is automatable, but Command's effect is open-ended behavioral compulsion, not a discrete condition/damage the pipeline can apply.

catalog.name: Compression
catalog.triggerDetail: can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement
catalog.effectDetail: Always-on movement allowance through tight spaces
catalog.notes: Pure passive narrative/movement permission. No roll, target, save, or applicable effect for the pipeline.

catalog.name: Confer Fire Resistance
catalog.triggerDetail: can grant Resistance to Fire damage to a rider while on the monster
catalog.effectDetail: Grants Fire resistance to a rider
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM identifies the rider; resistance applies to a separate creature, not via an attack/save event
catalog.notes: It's a resistance grant, which the pipeline conceptually understands, but there's no triggering attack/save/damage event and the beneficiary is a rider the GM must designate. Better as a manual active effect.

catalog.name: Conjure Infernal Chain
catalog.triggerDetail: Dexterity Saving Throw, target within range; Failure: damage + Restrained + pulled 30 ft; Success: chain disappears
catalog.effectDetail: Dex save; on fail, damage, Restrained until end of next turn, and 30-ft pull if Large or smaller
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets creature; size check for the pull and the 30-ft forced movement are GM-side; Restrained duration tracked manually
catalog.notes: Save + resistance-aware damage + Restrained condition are in-pipeline. The forced 30-ft pull and size gate need GM action; condition auto-expires at end of next turn.

catalog.name: Constrict
catalog.triggerDetail: Strength Saving Throw, one creature within range; Failure: damage + Grappled + Restrained
catalog.effectDetail: Str save; on fail, damage, Grappled (escape DC = passive Athletics), Restrained until grapple ends
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets creature; grapple-end/escape lifecycle tracked manually
catalog.notes: Save + damage + applying Grappled/Restrained is core-loop automatable; the grapple's ongoing escape mechanics are the only manual part.

catalog.name: Consume Life
catalog.triggerDetail: Constitution Saving Throw, a creature that has 0 Hit Points; Failure: target dies, monster regains HP
catalog.effectDetail: Targets a 0-HP creature; on fail the target dies and the monster heals
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets a creature already at 0 HP and forces the save; applying instant death is a heavy state change the GM likely confirms
catalog.notes: Forcing the save and healing the monster are doable; the precondition (target at 0 HP) and outright kill on fail are GM-confirmed rather than auto-applied. No damage roll, it's death-or-nothing.

catalog.name: Consume Memories
catalog.triggerDetail: Intelligence Saving Throw, target within range; Failure: damage, Success: half (onSave); plus memory steal if Humanoid dropped to 0 HP
catalog.effectDetail: Int save; full damage on fail, partial on save; narrative memory gain if it reduces a Humanoid to 0 HP
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets creature; the 'gains memories if Humanoid reduced to 0 HP' clause is narrative GM adjudication
catalog.notes: Save + full/partial resistance-aware damage is fully automatable. The memory-gain rider is pure narrative and out of scope, but doesn't block the mechanical part.

catalog.name: Corrosive Form
catalog.triggerDetail: A creature that hits the monster with a melee attack roll takes damage
catalog.effectDetail: Reactive acid damage to melee attacker; destroys nonmagical ammunition; cumulative -1 attack penalty to nonmagical weapons (destroyed at -5)
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM/manual must drag the attack-penalty active effect onto the specific weapon item; identify which weapons/ammo are nonmagical
catalog.notes: Multi-effect: onBeingHitMelee damage to attacker is automatable; destroying nonmagical ammunition and the cumulative weapon -1/-5 penalty are debuffItem/destroyItem the pipeline supports in principle, but the Foundry Note explicitly says the penalty effect must be dragged onto the target weapon manually. Hence partial.

catalog.name: Corrupting Touch
catalog.triggerDetail: [[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]]
catalog.effectDetail: Standard weapon attack with damage
catalog.notes: Plain attack+damage, no rider. Fully covered by the core hit/damage loop.

catalog.name: Coven Magic
catalog.triggerDetail: While within 30 ft of two hag allies, can cast Augury/Find Familiar/Identify/Locate Object/Scrying/Unseen Servant
catalog.effectDetail: Casts utility/divination spells (incl. Find Familiar / Unseen Servant) once per Long Rest
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM chooses which spell to cast and adjudicates the proximity-to-two-hags precondition and the utility effects
catalog.notes: Utility/divination spell list with no saves, attacks, or damage. None of these map to the pipeline's attack/save/damage/condition surface; entirely GM-run. (effect=summon for Find Familiar/Unseen Servant, but most are pure utility/other.)

catalog.name: Create Specter
catalog.triggerDetail: targets a Humanoid corpse dead <=1 minute; its spirit rises as a controlled Specter
catalog.effectDetail: Raises a Specter from a nearby fresh Humanoid corpse under the monster's control (max 7)
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM selects a valid corpse, places the Specter token/actor, and tracks the 7-specter control cap
catalog.notes: Summoning a new actor from a corpse is outside the attack/save/damage pipeline; requires GM to spawn and control the token and enforce preconditions and the cap.

catalog.name: Create Whirlwind
catalog.triggerDetail: conjures a whirlwind at a point it can see within 120 feet
catalog.effectDetail: Restrained + recurring damage on creatures in/entering the whirlwind via STR save; moves with whirlwind
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM places the whirlwind template, moves it up to 20 ft at start of each turn, and resolves who enters it each round; pipeline can force the STR save and apply Restrained + start-of-turn damage once a creature is targeted
catalog.notes: Persistent concentration template with per-turn re-saves and movement. Save/condition/damage steps are automatable, but the moving emanation and 'enters space' detection are GM-driven.

catalog.name: Crush
catalog.triggerDetail: attack; monster attaches to the target
catalog.effectDetail: attack + damage; on Advantage vs Medium-or-smaller, grapple/cover target → Blinded + suffocating; ongoing attached state
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM confirms hit/Advantage and whether target is Medium or smaller; the attach/detach grapple state and the monster's Speed-0 condition are tracked manually
catalog.notes: Attack roll + damage automatable. Blinded condition appliable, but 'attached', suffocating, and detach-via-check mechanics are ongoing states the GM manages.

catalog.name: Cunning Action
catalog.triggerDetail: takes the Dash, Disengage, or Hide action
catalog.effectDetail: Dash / Disengage / Hide
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM decides which action and resolves movement/Hide manually
catalog.notes: No roll, no damage, no save — pure movement/utility action. Nothing for the roll-card pipeline to apply.

catalog.name: Cursed Touch
catalog.triggerDetail: attack; if the target is a creature, it is cursed
catalog.effectDetail: attack + damage, then a curse: target gains no benefit from Short or Long Rest
catalog.inputsNeeded: none for the attack/damage; the rest-denial curse has no condition primitive, so GM tracks it
catalog.notes: Attack + damage fully automatable on hit. The 'cursed' rider is a non-standard custom condition (no rest benefit) — flaggable but not enforceable by the pipeline.

catalog.name: Darkness Aura
catalog.triggerDetail: Magical Darkness fills an Emanation while maintaining Concentration
catalog.effectDetail: creates magical darkness; darkvision can't penetrate, no light illuminates
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM places the darkness/lighting template and tracks concentration
catalog.notes: Pure environmental/lighting effect. No attack, save, damage, or condition for the roll-card pipeline; handled via Foundry lighting, not roll cards.

catalog.name: Deadly Leap
catalog.triggerDetail: jumps to a space within 15 ft containing Large-or-smaller creatures
catalog.effectDetail: DEX save in destination space → fail: damage + Prone; success: half damage + pushed 5 ft
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM resolves the jump/movement and selects which creatures are in the destination space
catalog.notes: Once targets are chosen, DEX save + damage + Prone (on fail) are fully automatable. Forced push 5 ft on success is manual movement; the leap itself is GM-placed.

catalog.name: Death Burst
catalog.triggerDetail: explodes (on death/condition per activation.condition)
catalog.effectDetail: DEX save vs each creature in emanation → fail: damage; success: half
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM confirms the trigger (creature dies) and targets in the emanation, both of which the pipeline mediates
catalog.notes: Classic save-for-half AoE. Pipeline knows turn/death and damage application; forces DEX save and applies resistance-aware damage. Standard automatable burst.

catalog.name: Death Glare
catalog.triggerDetail: WIS save vs creatures the monster can see within range
catalog.effectDetail: fail: if target has ≤20 HP, drops to 0 HP; else takes damage
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets the creatures; pipeline knows current HP to apply the ≤20 HP threshold and the drop-to-0
catalog.notes: WIS save with HP-threshold branch. Pipeline knows targets' HP and damage applied, so it can resolve drop-to-0 vs damage automatically.

catalog.name: Death Throes
catalog.triggerDetail: explodes when it dies
catalog.effectDetail: DEX save vs each creature in emanation → fail: damage; success: half. Plus self-revival in the Abyss
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM confirms death trigger and targets; the Abyssal revival is narrative/GM-handled
catalog.notes: The DEX-save AoE is fully automatable on death. The 'revives in the Abyss' clause is pure narrative state restoration outside the roll-card pipeline.

catalog.name: Deathless Agility
catalog.triggerDetail: takes the Dash or Disengage action
catalog.effectDetail: Dash / Disengage
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM decides and resolves movement
catalog.notes: Movement-only action with no roll/save/damage. Nothing for the pipeline to apply.

catalog.name: Deathless Strike
catalog.triggerDetail: moves up to half Speed and makes one Grave Strike attack
catalog.effectDetail: movement + one Grave Strike attack
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM resolves the half-Speed movement; the Grave Strike attack itself routes through the attacker's weapon/action item
catalog.notes: This is an action wrapper that triggers a referenced attack (Grave Strike). The pipeline can run that attack item on hit/damage; the movement portion is manual.

catalog.name: Deathly Teleport
catalog.triggerDetail: teleports up to a range; creatures near the space it left take damage
catalog.effectDetail: self-teleport, then damage to each creature within a radius of the origin space
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM moves the token to the teleport destination and identifies creatures near the origin space
catalog.notes: Teleport is GM-driven token relocation. The residual damage burst at the origin is automatable once targets are selected; appears to be automatic damage (no save in text).

catalog.name: Deflect Missile
catalog.triggerDetail: Trigger: the monster is hit (by an attack); Response reaction
catalog.effectDetail: reduces incoming damage by an amount; if reduced to 0, redirect via DEX save → fail: damage to another creature
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM confirms the triggering attack and chooses whether to redirect and at whom; pipeline applies the damage reduction and the redirected DEX-save damage
catalog.notes: Reaction on being hit. Damage reduction is automatable given the incoming-damage value; the conditional redirect (only if reduced to 0) plus new target selection needs GM input.

catalog.name: Demonic Restoration
catalog.triggerDetail: if it dies outside the Abyss, gains a new body and revives in the Abyss
catalog.effectDetail: self-revival with full HP somewhere in the Abyss
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM narrates/handles the off-screen revival
catalog.notes: Pure narrative recovery trait. No roll, save, damage, or applicable condition — outside the roll-card pipeline entirely.

catalog.name: Destroy Metal
catalog.triggerDetail: touches a creature/object within range; destroys a piece of metal
catalog.effectDetail: destroys a metal item/object (e.g., worn/carried nonmagical metal)
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM selects which metal item/object is targeted and destroyed
catalog.notes: Pipeline can destroy a chosen item, but the heavily templated desc obscures specifics; the GM must pick the metal object, so it's a GM-mediated destroyItem at best.

catalog.name: Devilish Claw
catalog.triggerDetail: attack + damage
catalog.effectDetail: weapon attack with average damage, no rider
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM confirms hit; routes through the attacker's weapon item
catalog.notes: Plain attack/damage with no secondary effect. Fully handled by the standard attack→hit→damage pipeline.

catalog.name: Diabolical Restoration
catalog.triggerDetail: if it dies outside the Nine Hells, revives in the Nine Hells
catalog.effectDetail: self-revival with full HP somewhere in the Nine Hells
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM narrates/handles the off-screen revival
catalog.notes: Narrative recovery trait, same shape as Demonic/Diabolical restorations. No pipeline-applicable mechanics.

catalog.name: Disrupt Life
catalog.triggerDetail: CON save vs each non-Undead creature in an emanation
catalog.effectDetail: CON save → fail: damage; success: half. Can't repeat until start of next turn
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets creatures in the emanation (excluding Undead); pipeline forces CON save and applies save-for-half damage
catalog.notes: Standard save-for-half AoE with a creature-type exclusion. The Undead filter is a GM target-selection detail; the rest is fully automatable.

catalog.name: Dissolving Pseudopod
catalog.triggerDetail: attack + damage; nonmagical armor worn by target takes -1 AC penalty
catalog.effectDetail: attack + damage, then cumulative -1 AC to worn nonmagical armor; destroyed if AC drops to 10
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM identifies the worn nonmagical armor item to debuff (and confirm when AC reaches 10 → destroy)
catalog.notes: Attack/damage automatable on hit. The armor AC-penalty is a debuffItem the pipeline can apply to a chosen armor item; destruction at AC 10 is a threshold the pipeline could track. GM picks the item.

catalog.name: Divine Aid
catalog.triggerDetail: casts Bless, Dispel Magic, Healing Word, or Lesser Restoration
catalog.effectDetail: spellcasting: buff/heal/restoration depending on chosen spell
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM chooses which spell and its target(s); each is its own spell resolution
catalog.notes: Wrapper that casts one of four spells. Healing Word heals, Bless buffs, Lesser Restoration/Dispel are utility — the pipeline routes to whichever spell item is chosen, so automation depends on the GM's pick.

catalog.name: Divine Awareness
catalog.triggerDetail: knows if it hears a lie
catalog.effectDetail: lie-detection sense
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM adjudicates whether a statement is a lie
catalog.notes: Pure passive information trait. No mechanical roll/save/damage/condition for the pipeline.

catalog.name: Dominate Mind
catalog.triggerDetail: WIS save vs one creature the monster can see within range
catalog.effectDetail: fail: Charmed (controlled, telepathy); repeats save when it takes damage / after 24h far away
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets the creature and adjudicates control; pipeline forces WIS save and applies Charmed and the damage-triggered re-saves
catalog.notes: WIS save and Charmed application are automatable, and the pipeline knows when the target takes damage to prompt re-saves. The ongoing 'acts as ally/under control' and the 24h/plane end-conditions are GM-tracked.

catalog.name: Draconic Origin
catalog.triggerDetail: related to a dragon type → grants damage resistance (DM's choice); Active Effect, manually toggled
catalog.effectDetail: damage resistance to Acid/Cold/Fire/Lightning/Poison per chosen origin
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM/DM chooses the damage type and manually enables the Active Effect (per Foundry Note)
catalog.notes: Static stat-block modifier set up as a manually toggled Active Effect. Not a triggered roll-card event; the resistance is consumed by damage application but configured outside the pipeline.

catalog.name: Dragon's Breath
catalog.triggerDetail: DEX save vs each creature in a Cone (breath weapon)
catalog.effectDetail: DEX save → fail: damage (type from Draconic Origin); success: half
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets creatures in the cone and confirms the chosen damage type from Draconic Origin
catalog.notes: Standard recharge breath weapon, save-for-half. Fully automatable once cone targets are selected; damage type derives from the Draconic Origin choice.

catalog.name: Draining Kiss
catalog.triggerDetail: CON save vs one creature Charmed by the monster within range
catalog.effectDetail: CON save → fail: damage; success: half. Either way, target's HP maximum decreases by damage taken
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets a creature Charmed by the monster; HP-maximum reduction must be tracked
catalog.notes: Save + save-for-half damage is automatable. The Hit Point maximum reduction equal to damage taken is a derived debuff the pipeline may not directly support, so partial.

catalog.name: Draining Swipe
catalog.triggerDetail: melee attack hits; Strength score decreases by 1d4
catalog.effectDetail: damage + recurring -1d4 Strength reduction via Active Effect; spawns Shadow if a Humanoid dies
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM must drag the Strength-reduction Active Effect onto the target sheet and edit its value each time; later Shadow summon is manual
catalog.notes: Damage is automatable. The desc's own Foundry Note says the stacking Strength drain requires manual GM drag/edit of the AE, so the ability-drain portion is not pipeline-automatable. Closest catalog effect is debuffItem-style stat reduction, but it's really an ability-score debuff. Shadow rising 1d4 hours later is out of band.

catalog.name: Dread Command
catalog.triggerDetail: casts Command (level 2 version); can't take action again until start of next turn
catalog.effectDetail: casts Command spell using monster's spellcasting ability
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM picks the one-word command and targets; resolving Command's forced behavior is manual
catalog.notes: This just casts the Command spell. The roll-card can fire the cast and the Wis save, but Command's effect (forcing a creature to obey a one-word command) is GM-adjudicated, so only partial.

catalog.name: Dreadful Glare
catalog.triggerDetail: Wisdom save, one target it can see within range
catalog.effectDetail: on failure Frightened until end of monster's next turn; on success immune for 24h
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets the creature
catalog.notes: Pipeline forces the Wis save and applies Frightened on fail. The 24h success-immunity is a soft tracking flag the GM can ignore, so still effectively automatable.

catalog.name: Earth Glide
catalog.triggerDetail: can burrow through nonmagical earth and stone without disturbing it
catalog.effectDetail: always-on burrow/glide movement capability
catalog.notes: Pure movement-mode trait. No roll, no trigger the card pipeline acts on; positioning is handled by the GM moving the token.

catalog.name: Eldritch Burst
catalog.triggerDetail: attack roll then damage
catalog.effectDetail: single attack with damage, no rider
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets the token
catalog.notes: Plain attack item. Hit/miss + damage are exactly what the pipeline handles.

catalog.name: Eldritch Restoration
catalog.triggerDetail: if destroyed, gains a new body in 5d10 days in the Far Realm
catalog.effectDetail: delayed off-plane revival with full HP
catalog.notes: Narrative respawn 5d10 days later in another plane. Nothing for the in-combat pipeline to apply.

catalog.name: Elemental Restoration
catalog.triggerDetail: if it meets the requirement, body dissolves and revives in 1d4 days on the Plane of Earth
catalog.effectDetail: delayed off-plane revival with full HP
catalog.notes: Same pattern as the other Restoration traits: off-band delayed revival, not pipeline-actionable.

catalog.name: Enchanting Bow
catalog.triggerDetail: ranged attack hits; target Charmed until start of monster's next turn
catalog.effectDetail: damage + Charmed condition on a successful hit
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets the token
catalog.notes: On-hit damage plus a duration-limited Charmed condition. Pipeline confirms the hit, applies damage, and applies Charmed.

catalog.name: Engulf
catalog.triggerDetail: moves through creatures' spaces; Strength save for each space entered
catalog.effectDetail: on fail: engulfed (Restrained, Suffocating, total cover, recurring start-of-turn damage, repeat save); object destroyed after 1 min
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM moves the token and chooses which creatures' spaces are entered; tracking the ongoing engulf grapple, movement-with-monster, and per-turn recurring save/damage is largely manual
catalog.notes: The initial Str save + Restrained on fail is automatable, and recurring damage at start of turn fits turnStart. But the engulf state (moves with monster, total cover, suffocation, escape on later saves, object destruction) is multi-step GM bookkeeping, so partial.

catalog.name: Entangling Rope
catalog.triggerDetail: Strength save, one creature it can see within range
catalog.effectDetail: on fail: damage + Restrained until rope destroyed / Bonus Action release / reuse
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM tracks rope HP and decides when the monster releases or reuses the rope to end the Restrained condition
catalog.notes: Force-save, apply damage and Restrained on fail — all automatable. The open-ended end condition (until rope destroyed or released) needs GM tracking, so the condition isn't auto-cleared. Effect is fundamentally a condition application.

catalog.name: Enthralling Panache
catalog.triggerDetail: Wisdom save, creatures it can see within range
catalog.effectDetail: on fail: Charmed until start of monster's next turn
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets the affected creatures
catalog.notes: Force Wis save, apply Charmed on fail with a clean duration. Squarely in pipeline scope.

catalog.name: Ephemeral
catalog.triggerDetail: can't wear or carry anything
catalog.effectDetail: flavor/inventory restriction
catalog.notes: Pure descriptive trait with no mechanical roll or applied effect.

catalog.name: Ethereal Jaunt
catalog.triggerDetail: teleports between Material and Ethereal Plane
catalog.effectDetail: self plane-shift Material <-> Ethereal
catalog.notes: Plane shift / self-teleport. No save, no damage; the pipeline doesn't model cross-plane positioning, so the GM handles it.

catalog.name: Ethereal Sight
catalog.triggerDetail: can see 60 ft into the Ethereal Plane
catalog.effectDetail: always-on special senses
catalog.notes: Sensory trait; nothing to apply or roll.

catalog.name: Ethereal Stride
catalog.triggerDetail: monster and allies within range teleport between planes
catalog.effectDetail: self + nearby creatures plane-shift Material <-> Ethereal
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM chooses which creatures within range come along
catalog.notes: Group plane shift. Like Ethereal Jaunt, cross-plane teleport is outside what the card pipeline applies.

catalog.name: Etherealness
catalog.triggerDetail: casts the Etherealness spell using Charisma
catalog.effectDetail: becomes ethereal (plane shift via spell)
catalog.notes: Casts Etherealness; effectively a self plane-shift/buff. No save or damage for the pipeline; cross-plane state is GM-tracked.

catalog.name: Evasion
catalog.triggerDetail: Dex save for half damage: no damage on success, half on failure
catalog.effectDetail: modifies Dex-save damage taken (none on success, half on fail); disabled while Incapacitated
catalog.inputsNeeded: Pipeline must know the incoming effect allows a Dex save for half and whether the monster is Incapacitated
catalog.notes: It's a defensive damage modifier keyed to the monster's own Dex saves. The pipeline knows save pass/fail and applies damage, so it could halve/zero the applied damage — but only if it recognizes the source effect as a Dex-half effect, which DDB roll data may not flag. Hence partial.

catalog.name: Exalted Restoration
catalog.triggerDetail: if it dies outside Mount Celestia, body disappears and it revives instantly there
catalog.effectDetail: instant off-plane revival with full HP
catalog.notes: On-death narrative revival on another plane. Nothing applied within the encounter.

catalog.name: Fear Aura
catalog.triggerDetail: emanation while not Incapacitated; Wisdom save
catalog.effectDetail: on fail: Frightened until start of its next turn; on success immune 24h
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM identifies which creatures are within the emanation each round and when the aura check triggers
catalog.notes: The save-and-apply-Frightened mechanic is automatable, but aura triggers (who is in range, recurring entry/turn checks, suppressed while Incapacitated) are not part of the action-driven pipeline, so it needs GM staging. Effect is force-save into a condition.

catalog.name: Fetid Cloud
catalog.triggerDetail: Constitution save for each creature in the emanation
catalog.effectDetail: on fail: Poisoned until end of its next turn (action-or-bonus-action limit, no reactions)
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM identifies creatures inside the emanation; the modified Poisoned restriction is tracked manually
catalog.notes: Force Con save and apply Poisoned is in scope. Aura membership and the bespoke action-economy rider on this Poisoned variant need GM handling, so partial.

catalog.name: Fiendish Restoration
catalog.triggerDetail: if it dies outside Gehenna, body dissolves and it revives instantly there
catalog.effectDetail: instant off-plane revival with full HP
catalog.notes: Same off-plane instant-revive pattern; nothing for the pipeline to apply.

catalog.name: Fiendish Touch
catalog.triggerDetail: attack roll then damage
catalog.effectDetail: single attack with damage, no rider
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets the token
catalog.notes: Plain attack item; hit/miss + damage fully covered by the pipeline.

catalog.name: Fiery Bolt
catalog.triggerDetail: attack roll then damage
catalog.effectDetail: single attack with damage, no rider
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets the token
catalog.notes: Plain attack item; resistance-aware damage application handles the fire type.

catalog.name: Fiery Mace
catalog.triggerDetail: attack roll then damage
catalog.effectDetail: single attack with damage, no rider
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets the token
catalog.notes: Plain weapon attack; squarely in pipeline scope.

catalog.name: Fiery Rays
catalog.triggerDetail: uses Spellcasting to cast Scorching Ray; can't take action again until next turn
catalog.effectDetail: casts Scorching Ray (multiple fire ray attacks)
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM allocates each ray to targets and rolls each ray's attack
catalog.notes: Scorching Ray is several separate ranged attack rolls the GM distributes among targets. Each individual ray's hit/damage is automatable, but multi-ray allocation makes the whole action partial. Borders on multiattack in shape.

catalog.name: Fire Absorption
catalog.triggerDetail: subjected to Fire damage
catalog.effectDetail: regains HP equal to Fire damage dealt
catalog.notes: Pipeline knows damage applied and its type; on Fire damage, heal the same amount instead. Easily automated since damage type is tracked.

catalog.name: Fire Aura
catalog.triggerDetail: at the end of each of the monster's turns
catalog.effectDetail: fire damage to chosen creatures in Emanation
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM selects which creatures in the emanation are affected (monster's choice)
catalog.notes: Fires at turnEnd. No save. GM must pick targets in the emanation; pipeline can then apply resistance-aware damage to GM-targeted tokens.

catalog.name: Fire Breath
catalog.triggerDetail: Line breath weapon, Dex save
catalog.effectDetail: Dex save, fail full damage / success half
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets tokens in the Line template
catalog.notes: Classic breath weapon (recharge-style). Pipeline forces save, applies half-on-success damage. GM places the line/targets.

catalog.name: Fire Form
catalog.triggerDetail: first time it enters a creature's space on a turn
catalog.effectDetail: fire damage on entering a creature's space
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM confirms entry into a creature's space (movement-driven trigger)
catalog.notes: Movement squeezing is passive; the damage rider triggers on entering a space. Pipeline can apply damage once GM signals the space entry, but movement/space tracking isn't in the core hit/damage/save loop.

catalog.name: Fist
catalog.triggerDetail: attack roll then damage
catalog.effectDetail: weapon attack damage
catalog.notes: Plain weapon item: attack + damage. This IS the core pipeline action.

catalog.name: Flame Spear
catalog.triggerDetail: attack roll then damage; spear returns to hand
catalog.effectDetail: weapon attack damage; flavor return on ranged attack
catalog.notes: Weapon attack + damage. 'Returns to hand' is pure flavor with no mechanical state to track.

catalog.name: Flame Sword
catalog.triggerDetail: attack roll then damage
catalog.effectDetail: weapon attack damage
catalog.notes: Plain weapon item: attack + damage. Core pipeline action.

catalog.name: Flame Whip
catalog.triggerDetail: if target is Huge or smaller, on hit
catalog.effectDetail: pull target up to 25 ft and apply Prone
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM confirms target size eligibility and performs/approves the 25 ft pull positioning
catalog.notes: On-hit damage is core; the Prone condition is applyable by the pipeline. The forced pull (movement/repositioning) needs GM placement. Size gate is a GM/known-target check.

catalog.name: Fling
catalog.triggerDetail: throws a creature it has Grappled; Dex save
catalog.effectDetail: throw grappled creature; Dex save fail = damage + Prone, success half
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM picks the grappled creature, the destination space (within range), and any creatures in that space
catalog.notes: Save + damage + Prone is automatable, but the teleport/throw destination and which creatures occupy it are GM positioning choices. Grapple state is GM-known.

catalog.name: Flyby
catalog.triggerDetail: doesn't provoke Opportunity Attacks when flying out of reach
catalog.effectDetail: suppresses opportunity attacks
catalog.notes: Pure movement-permission modifier. No card-driven hit/damage/save/condition to apply; it's a GM-adjudicated movement rule outside the pipeline.

catalog.name: Flying Sword
catalog.triggerDetail: attack roll then damage; sword returns/hovers
catalog.effectDetail: weapon attack damage; flavor return on ranged attack
catalog.notes: Weapon attack + damage. Return/hover is flavor with no mechanical effect to track.

catalog.name: Fog Cloud
catalog.triggerDetail: casts Fog Cloud spell
catalog.effectDetail: creates a Fog Cloud (heavily obscured area)
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM places the spell template / area of obscurement
catalog.notes: Spell-cast that creates a terrain/obscurement template. No hit, damage, save, or condition for the pipeline; area placement and vision effects are outside its surface.

catalog.name: Force Bolt
catalog.triggerDetail: attack roll then damage
catalog.effectDetail: weapon (ranged) attack damage
catalog.notes: Plain weapon/attack item: attack + damage. Core pipeline action.

catalog.name: Foreleg
catalog.triggerDetail: attack roll then damage
catalog.effectDetail: weapon attack damage
catalog.notes: Plain weapon item: attack + damage. Core pipeline action.

catalog.name: Freeze
catalog.triggerDetail: if the monster takes Cold damage
catalog.effectDetail: Speed decreases by 20 ft until end of its next turn
catalog.notes: Pipeline knows when this creature takes Cold damage (type tracked), so the trigger is detectable. The effect is a speed reduction (not a standard condition or item debuff); applying a temporary Speed modifier is an Active Effect the pipeline may not model directly. effect=debuffItem is the closest catalog bucket for a non-condition stat debuff.

catalog.name: Freezing Burst
catalog.triggerDetail: Con save in a Sphere; can't reuse until start of next turn
catalog.effectDetail: Con save, fail = cold damage + Speed 0 until end of target's next turn
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets tokens in the Sphere
catalog.notes: Save + damage is core; Speed 0 is effectively a movement-lock condition the pipeline can apply on fail. Self-recharge ('can't take again until start of next turn') is a GM/usage gate. GM places the sphere.

catalog.name: Frightening Gaze
catalog.triggerDetail: casts Fear; can't reuse until start of next turn
catalog.effectDetail: casts Fear (Frightened on failed Wis save)
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets affected creatures; resolves the Fear spell's save and Frightened condition
catalog.notes: Resolves as the Fear spell. Pipeline can force the save and apply Frightened, but Fear's full mechanics (recurring saves, area) live in the spell item, not a simple card. Usage gate is GM-tracked.

catalog.name: Frightful Presence
catalog.triggerDetail: casts Fear; can't reuse until start of next turn
catalog.effectDetail: casts Fear (Frightened on failed save, spell save DC)
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets affected creatures; resolves the Fear spell's save and Frightened condition
catalog.notes: Same as Frightening Gaze — Fear spell-cast. Save + Frightened are applyable; full spell behavior and usage gate need the spell item / GM.

catalog.name: Frost Axe
catalog.triggerDetail: attack roll then damage
catalog.effectDetail: weapon attack damage
catalog.notes: Plain weapon item: attack + damage. Core pipeline action.

catalog.name: Frost Breath
catalog.triggerDetail: Cone breath weapon, Con save
catalog.effectDetail: Con save, fail full damage / success half
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets tokens in the Cone template
catalog.notes: Classic cone breath weapon. Pipeline forces save and applies half-on-success damage; GM places the cone/targets.

catalog.name: Gibbering
catalog.triggerDetail: any creature that starts its turn within range while babbling; Wis save
catalog.effectDetail: Wis save, fail = random action table (1d8) controlling the creature's turn
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM resolves the random-action outcome (do nothing / move randomly / attack random creature) and drives that turn
catalog.notes: Trigger (creature starting its turn in range) and the forced Wis save are automatable, but the failure result is a randomized loss-of-control behavior the GM must enact — not a simple condition the pipeline applies. No damage.

catalog.name: Giggling Magic
catalog.triggerDetail: Cha save vs a target; can't reuse until start of next turn
catalog.effectDetail: Cha save, fail = psychic damage + 1d6 penalty to checks/attacks until end of its next turn
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets the creature; the per-roll 1d6 subtraction needs an ongoing effect applied to the target's d20 tests
catalog.notes: Save + damage are core. The lingering 'roll 1d6 and subtract from each ability check/attack' is an ongoing penalty effect the pipeline likely can't enforce on the target's future rolls; GM/Active Effect needed. Self usage gate is GM-tracked.

catalog.name: Glare
catalog.triggerDetail: uses Eye Rays
catalog.effectDetail: invokes the Eye Rays item
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM selects which eye ray(s) and their targets via the referenced item
catalog.notes: Just a pointer to a separate Eye Rays item; the actual effects live there. As written this card does nothing on its own — GM must run the referenced multi-effect item.

catalog.name: Gore
catalog.triggerDetail: if target eligible size and monster moved NN+ ft straight before the hit
catalog.effectDetail: weapon attack; on charge, extra 2d8 piercing + Prone
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM confirms the charge condition (moved straight toward target) and target size eligibility
catalog.notes: Base attack + damage is core, and Prone is applyable. The extra-damage rider depends on a movement/charge precondition the pipeline doesn't track, so GM must confirm before the bonus damage and Prone apply.

catalog.name: Gouge
catalog.triggerDetail: attack hits, applies Poisoned
catalog.effectDetail: weapon attack damage + Poisoned until end of its next turn
catalog.notes: On-hit damage plus unconditional Poisoned condition with a fixed duration — both directly applyable by the pipeline on a confirmed hit.

catalog.name: Grab
catalog.triggerDetail: attack hits a Medium or smaller creature
catalog.effectDetail: Grappled (escape DC = passive Athletics), plus weapon damage
catalog.notes: Standard onHit weapon attack: pipeline confirms the hit, applies damage, then applies the Grappled condition with the listed escape DC. Size gate (Medium or smaller) is checkable from the target token.

catalog.name: Great Bow
catalog.triggerDetail: hit; Speed decreases by 10 ft until end of its next turn
catalog.effectDetail: weapon damage + Speed -10 ft (movement debuff, not a named condition)
catalog.notes: Damage on hit is fully automatable. The Speed -10 ft until end of next turn is a timed movement debuff with no matching 5e condition; pipeline can flag/log it but applying and auto-expiring a raw speed change is not clean. Effect tagged debuffItem only because schema lacks a 'statDebuff' value; real effect is a movement/speed reduction.

catalog.name: Greater Magic Resistance
catalog.triggerDetail: auto-succeeds saves vs spells; spell attacks auto-miss; can't be scried
catalog.effectDetail: blanket immunity to spell saves and spell attack rolls; anti-divination
catalog.notes: Always-on defensive modifier. The pipeline tracks hit/miss and save results for THIS creature's own actions, not how it resolves against incoming spells, and has no notion of 'this attack/save came from a spell'. Out of scope.

catalog.name: Guiding Light
catalog.triggerDetail: uses Spellcasting to cast Guiding Bolt (level 2)
catalog.effectDetail: casts the Guiding Bolt spell as a separate action/item
catalog.notes: This is a recast of another spell item rather than an inline effect. The pipeline can roll/apply Guiding Bolt itself if it's the chosen action, but this feature is just a pointer to that spell; nothing here for the card pipeline to add on top.

catalog.name: Hail of Bark
catalog.triggerDetail: attack roll then damage
catalog.effectDetail: plain weapon attack damage on hit
catalog.notes: Vanilla attack + damage with no rider. Fully covered by attack item + hit confirmation + resistance-aware damage.

catalog.name: Hammer Throw
catalog.triggerDetail: hit; target pushed 15 ft away and has Disadvantage on next attack
catalog.effectDetail: weapon damage + forced push 15 ft + Disadvantage on its next attack roll
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM confirms/executes the 15 ft push placement
catalog.notes: Damage automatable. Forced movement (push 15 ft) needs GM to reposition the token. The 'Disadvantage on next attack before end of its next turn' is a transient modifier with no matching condition; pipeline can note it but not enforce it on a future roll.

catalog.name: Harpoon
catalog.triggerDetail: hit a Large or smaller creature; pull up to 15 ft toward monster
catalog.effectDetail: weapon damage + forced pull up to 15 ft toward the attacker
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM executes the pull (up to 15 ft toward attacker)
catalog.notes: Damage automatable; size gate checkable. Forced movement requires GM token repositioning, so it pauses for GM placement rather than auto-applying.

catalog.name: Hasten
catalog.triggerDetail: takes the Dash and Disengage actions
catalog.effectDetail: self-only Dash + Disengage (action economy / movement)
catalog.notes: Self movement/action-economy buff with no roll, no target, no damage, no condition. Nothing in the hit/damage/save pipeline to drive; purely the creature's own movement handled by the GM.

catalog.name: Heart Sight
catalog.triggerDetail: Charisma save; on failure monster learns target's emotions and alignment
catalog.effectDetail: Cha save (Celestials/Fiends/Undead auto-fail); failure reveals info only, no mechanical effect
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM may auto-fail Celestials/Fiends/Undead
catalog.notes: Pipeline can force the Charisma save against one visible target. The consequence is pure information (knows emotions/alignment) with no condition/damage, so there's nothing mechanical to apply after the save resolves; the creature-type auto-fail is a GM call.

catalog.name: Heat Aura
catalog.triggerDetail: at end of each of the monster's turns, creatures in an Emanation take damage
catalog.effectDetail: automatic (no save) damage to each creature in the emanation each turn end
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM selects which tokens are inside the emanation
catalog.notes: Fires on turnEnd, which the pipeline knows. No save, so damage application is resistance-aware and straightforward, but the pipeline has no geometry engine; the GM must designate the affected tokens in the emanation, then damage applies to all of them.

catalog.name: Heated Blade
catalog.triggerDetail: attack roll then damage
catalog.effectDetail: plain weapon attack damage on hit
catalog.notes: Vanilla attack + damage, no rider. Fully automatable.

catalog.name: Hellfire Spellcasting
catalog.triggerDetail: casts Fireball (level 5) twice; may swap one for Hold Monster or Wall of Fire
catalog.effectDetail: recasts Fireball x2 (or substitute spells) as separate spell items
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM chooses whether to substitute Hold Monster / Wall of Fire
catalog.notes: Pointer to other spell items. Each Fireball, if cast as its own card, would force a Dex save with resistance-aware damage — but this feature itself is an orchestration (twice, with optional swap) that the GM drives; nothing inline for the card to apply.

catalog.name: Hellish Restoration
catalog.triggerDetail: if it dies in the Nine Hells, revives with full HP in 1d10 days
catalog.effectDetail: narrative full-HP revival days later, unless killed under Bless or remains blessed with Holy Water
catalog.notes: Triggers onDeath, which the pipeline knows, but the effect resolves over 1d10 days off-combat with location and slayer conditions. Not an in-encounter mechanical effect; purely narrative GM bookkeeping.

catalog.name: Hold Breath
catalog.triggerDetail: can hold its breath for N units
catalog.effectDetail: environmental endurance trait, no combat mechanics
catalog.notes: Pure utility trait; no trigger the pipeline observes and no effect to apply.

catalog.name: Holy Burst
catalog.triggerDetail: Dexterity save in a radius Sphere; failure full damage, success half
catalog.effectDetail: Dex save AoE; resistance-aware damage, half on success
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM selects tokens within the sphere
catalog.notes: Pipeline forces the Dex save per target and applies full/half resistance-aware damage based on pass/fail — its core competency. The only gap is geometry: GM must pick which tokens are in the sphere.

catalog.name: Holy Mace
catalog.triggerDetail: attack roll then damage
catalog.effectDetail: plain weapon attack damage on hit
catalog.notes: Vanilla attack + damage, no rider. Fully automatable.

catalog.name: Hooves
catalog.triggerDetail: attack roll then damage
catalog.effectDetail: plain weapon attack damage on hit
catalog.notes: Vanilla attack + damage, no rider. Fully automatable.

catalog.name: Horrific Visage
catalog.triggerDetail: Wisdom save in a Cone; failure damage + Frightened, success immune 24h
catalog.effectDetail: Wis save; failure = resistance-aware damage + Frightened until start of monster's next turn
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM selects tokens in the Cone (and must see the monster)
catalog.notes: Pipeline forces the save and, on failure, applies damage and the Frightened condition with a turn-based duration. Gaps: cone geometry and the line-of-sight ('can see the monster') gate are GM calls; the success-grants-24h-immunity bookkeeping is out of scope.

catalog.name: Horror Nimbus
catalog.triggerDetail: Wisdom save in an Emanation; failure damage + Frightened, success immune 24h
