catalog.effectDetail: Wis save; failure = resistance-aware damage + Frightened with multi-clause end conditions
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM selects tokens in the emanation
catalog.notes: Save + damage + Frightened are within the pipeline. Frightened's end conditions ('until it takes damage, or ends its turn out of line of sight') and the 24h-immunity tracking are not auto-enforceable; emanation geometry is a GM call.

catalog.name: Hurl Flame
catalog.triggerDetail: hit; flammable unattended object starts burning
catalog.effectDetail: weapon damage on hit; environmental ignite of unattended flammable object
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM adjudicates whether the target is a flammable unattended object
catalog.notes: Damage vs creatures fully automatable. The 'object starts burning' clause is environmental, applies only to unattended objects, and has no token/condition representation; GM handles it.

catalog.name: Ice Spear
catalog.triggerDetail: hit; no Bonus Action/Reaction, Speed -10, one action only, until end of its next turn
catalog.effectDetail: weapon damage + a bundle of action-economy/speed debuffs (Slow-like); spear returns to hand
catalog.notes: Damage automatable. The rider is a Slow-spell-like bundle (no Bonus Action, no Reaction, Speed -10, single action) with no matching 5e condition, so the pipeline can only note it, not enforce it on the target's future turn. Spear-returns-to-hand is flavor.

catalog.name: Ice Walk
catalog.triggerDetail: moves/climbs icy surfaces freely; ice/snow difficult terrain costs no extra movement
catalog.effectDetail: movement utility trait
catalog.notes: Always-on movement trait with no roll and no effect for the card pipeline to apply.

catalog.name: Ice Wall
catalog.triggerDetail: casts Wall of Ice (level 8)
catalog.effectDetail: creates a Wall of Ice (terrain/object spell) as a separate spell item
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM places the wall template
catalog.notes: Recast of another spell that produces battlefield terrain. The card pipeline has no template/terrain placement; this is GM-driven. Tagged summon as the closest 'creates a battlefield object' value.

catalog.name: Ignited Illumination
catalog.triggerDetail: sets itself ablaze or extinguishes; while ablaze sheds Bright/Dim Light
catalog.effectDetail: self light toggle (token lighting), no mechanical combat effect
catalog.notes: Self light-source toggle. No hit/save/damage hook; would be a token lighting change, which is outside the roll-card pipeline.

catalog.name: Illumination
catalog.triggerDetail: sheds Bright Light in a radius and Dim Light beyond
catalog.effectDetail: always-on light source, no mechanical combat effect
catalog.notes: Static light-emission trait. No trigger the pipeline observes and nothing to apply via roll cards.

catalog.name: Illusory Appearance
catalog.triggerDetail: casts Disguise Self using Constitution
catalog.effectDetail: self-disguise illusion via Disguise Self spell
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM/player chooses the disguise appearance and adjudicates Investigation checks to see through it
catalog.notes: Pure narrative illusion; no condition/damage/save the pipeline can apply. GM-handled.

catalog.name: Immutable Form
catalog.triggerDetail: can't shape-shift
catalog.effectDetail: denies shapeshifting; immunity flavor
catalog.notes: Always-on restriction with no roll-card hook.

catalog.name: Incorporeal Movement
catalog.triggerDetail: takes damage if it ends its turn inside an object
catalog.effectDetail: 1d10 force when ending turn inside an object
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM must confirm the creature ended its turn inside an object (positional check the pipeline can't see)
catalog.notes: Pipeline can roll/apply 1d10 force at turn end, but firing condition depends on GM confirming it's inside an object. The move-through-terrain part is unautomatable movement flavor.

catalog.name: Incubus Form
catalog.triggerDetail: when it finishes a Long Rest, shape-shift into Incubus stat block
catalog.effectDetail: swap to a different actor/stat block on long rest
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM swaps the actor/stat block out of combat
catalog.notes: Out-of-combat stat-block swap; not a combat roll-card event.

catalog.name: Infernal Glaive
catalog.triggerDetail: if target is a creature and lacks an infernal wound, CON save
catalog.effectDetail: CON save; on fail infernal wound = ongoing HP loss at start of each turn for 1 min
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM tracks wound removal triggers (HP-restoring spell, action to stanch with a Medicine check) and the ongoing start-of-turn HP loss
catalog.notes: Attack + damage + onHit CON save are all in-pipeline. The persistent infernal-wound DoT and its multiple removal conditions need GM/effect tracking; pipeline can force the save and apply start-of-turn damage but not the bespoke close conditions.

catalog.name: Infernal Sting
catalog.triggerDetail: damage, and target is Poisoned until start of monster's next turn
catalog.effectDetail: Poisoned (no regaining HP) until start of monster's next turn
catalog.notes: Attack hits then apply Poisoned with a clean turn-bound duration; no save. The 'can't regain HP' rider is part of Poisoned/duration. Fully in-pipeline.

catalog.name: Infernal Tail
catalog.triggerDetail: DEX save, one target within range the monster can see
catalog.effectDetail: DEX save; on fail damage + infernal wound (ongoing HP loss at turn start)
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM tracks infernal-wound DoT and its removal conditions (HP-restoring spell, action + DC 17 WIS/Medicine check)
catalog.notes: GM-targeted single creature, forced DEX save with damage on fail = core pipeline. Same infernal-wound DoT/close-condition tracking as Infernal Glaive limits it to partial.

catalog.name: Ink Cloud
catalog.triggerDetail: Trigger: takes damage while underwater; releases ink Cube + moves Swim Speed
catalog.effectDetail: creates Heavily Obscured ink Cube template and the monster moves; obscurement for 1 min
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM confirms 'underwater', places the ink template, and resolves the monster's swim movement
catalog.notes: Pipeline knows onDamaged, but the effect is a terrain template (Heavily Obscured) plus self-movement, neither of which the roll-card applies. GM-placed/handled; reaction trigger is detectable.

catalog.name: Inscrutable
catalog.triggerDetail: no remote magic detection; Insight checks at Disadvantage
catalog.effectDetail: anti-divination + Disadvantage on Insight to read it
catalog.notes: Out-of-combat/social passive; the Insight Disadvantage is a GM-side skill-check modifier, not in the damage/save/condition pipeline.

catalog.name: Invisibility
catalog.triggerDetail: casts Invisibility on itself, no components, Charisma
catalog.effectDetail: self Invisible condition via Invisibility spell
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM applies the Invisible condition/effect to the caster (self-target, not a roll-card hit outcome)
catalog.notes: Self-buff that grants the Invisible condition; the pipeline applies conditions to GM-targeted tokens on hit/save, but this is a self-cast with no attack/save, so it sits outside the normal flow. Easy as a manual effect.

catalog.name: Iron Scent
catalog.triggerDetail: pinpoints location of (metal) within range
catalog.effectDetail: detection sense, no mechanical effect
catalog.notes: Sensory/perception ability; nothing for the roll-card to apply.

catalog.name: Jumper
catalog.triggerDetail: jump distance uses Dexterity rather than Strength
catalog.effectDetail: movement/jump calculation modifier
catalog.notes: Always-on jump-stat substitution; not a combat roll event.

catalog.name: Lash
catalog.triggerDetail: makes one Tentacle attack
catalog.effectDetail: triggers one additional Tentacle attack
catalog.notes: Resolves as a normal Tentacle weapon attack the pipeline already handles (attack roll, hit/miss, damage). Effectively a multiattack/extra-attack entry.

catalog.name: Leap
catalog.triggerDetail: jumps up to X feet by a condition
catalog.effectDetail: self movement (jump)
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM moves the token
catalog.notes: Self-movement only; the roll-card pipeline doesn't reposition tokens or resolve jumps.

catalog.name: Legendary Resistance
catalog.triggerDetail: if it fails a saving throw, can choose to succeed instead
catalog.effectDetail: converts a failed save into a success (consumes a use)
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM/player chooses whether to spend a use, and the system tracks remaining uses
catalog.notes: Pipeline knows save pass/fail, so it can detect a failure and prompt; but the elect-to-succeed decision, use tracking, and retroactively flipping the save outcome require GM input/automation glue.

catalog.name: Life Drain
catalog.triggerDetail: if target is a creature, Hit Point maximum decreases by damage taken
catalog.effectDetail: reduce target's HP maximum by the damage dealt
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM/system must reduce and track the target's max-HP reduction (and its until-long-rest recovery)
catalog.notes: Attack + damage are fully in-pipeline; the rider lowers max HP by damage taken. ddb-roll-cards applies damage but max-HP reduction is a stat change it likely can't set directly, so partial. (effect tagged debuffItem as the closest 'stat-debuff' bucket — it is not an item debuff.)

catalog.name: Light Sensitivity
catalog.triggerDetail: Disadvantage on attack rolls in Bright Light
catalog.effectDetail: Disadvantage on its own attack rolls while in Bright Light
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM judges lighting and applies Disadvantage to the attacker's own rolls
catalog.notes: Conditional self-attack-roll penalty driven by ambient light; the pipeline doesn't gate the attacker's own advantage state on lighting. (effect bucketed as a stat/attack debuff, not literal item.)

catalog.name: Lightning Absorption
catalog.triggerDetail: subjected to Lightning damage, regains HP equal to it
catalog.effectDetail: heal HP equal to incoming Lightning damage (instead of taking it)
catalog.notes: Pipeline sees damage and damage type; on Lightning it can convert/negate and heal by that amount. Type-aware, so close to a resistance/absorption rule the pipeline can apply.

catalog.name: Lightning Blade
catalog.triggerDetail: target can't take a Reaction until start of monster's next turn
catalog.effectDetail: denies Reactions until start of monster's next turn
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM enforces the no-Reaction restriction (Foundry has no native 'can't react' condition to auto-block)
catalog.notes: Attack + damage automatable; the 'no Reaction' rider can be applied as a timed effect/flag but isn't a standard condition the engine enforces, so GM must honor it.

catalog.name: Lightning Breath
catalog.triggerDetail: DEX save, each target in a line template; failure full, success half
catalog.effectDetail: DEX save AoE line; full damage on fail, half on success
catalog.notes: Classic breath weapon: GM targets tokens in the template, pipeline forces DEX saves and applies full/half lightning damage per result. Recharge tracking is the only extra and is standard.

catalog.name: Lightning Storm
catalog.triggerDetail: DEX save, each creature in a cylinder; failure full, success half
catalog.effectDetail: DEX save AoE cylinder; full on fail, half on success
catalog.notes: Same shape as Lightning Breath/Strike: GM-targeted creatures in template, forced DEX saves, full/half damage. Fully in-pipeline.

catalog.name: Lightning Strike
catalog.triggerDetail: DEX save, one target within range; failure full, success half
catalog.effectDetail: DEX save single target; full on fail, half on success
catalog.notes: Single GM-targeted creature, forced DEX save, full/half lightning damage. Straightforward for the pipeline.

catalog.name: Limited Amphibiousness
catalog.triggerDetail: breathe air and water; must submerge every 4 hours
catalog.effectDetail: breathing rule / suffocation timer
catalog.notes: Exploration/survival rule on a 4-hour clock; no combat roll-card hook.

catalog.name: Loathsome Limbs
catalog.triggerDetail: ends a turn Bloodied and took 15+ Slashing that turn → sever a limb
catalog.effectDetail: spawns a Troll Limb actor that acts after the monster; adds an Exhaustion level
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM confirms Bloodied + 15+ Slashing in the turn, spawns the Troll Limb token/actor, and manually manages stacking Exhaustion levels (per Foundry note)
catalog.notes: Pipeline can track damage type/amount and Bloodied state to detect the trigger, but the effect is summoning a separate actor and applying stackable Exhaustion (Foundry note says GM manages level manually). Summon + multi-stack condition is beyond auto-application.

catalog.name: Luring Song
catalog.triggerDetail: WIS save, each humanoid/target in an Emanation; Concentration
catalog.effectDetail: Charmed + Incapacitated, forced movement toward singer; repeated saves
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM handles ongoing Concentration, end-of-turn re-saves, forced movement toward the harpy, and bonus re-saves on taking damage/entering hazards
catalog.notes: Initial WIS save + applying Charmed/Incapacitated is in-pipeline, but the sustained behavior (forced movement, repeated end-of-turn and on-damage saves, Concentration duration, 24h immunity) requires substantial GM/effect management beyond a single roll card.

catalog.name: Magic of the Spider Queen
catalog.triggerDetail: monster casts Darkness, Faerie Fire, or Web
catalog.effectDetail: innate spellcasting (Darkness/Faerie Fire/Web) using Wisdom; spell-driven effects
catalog.inputsNeeded: which spell to cast and where to place the area; resolving each spell's full mechanics (conditions, concentration)
catalog.notes: Just grants spellcasting access; the actual effects live in separate spell items the pipeline doesn't drive. Faerie Fire/Web carry conditions+saves but aren't this feature's roll.

catalog.name: Magic Resistance
catalog.triggerDetail: Advantage on saves vs spells and magical effects
catalog.effectDetail: advantage on saving throws against magical effects
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM judgment whether the incoming save is from a spell/magical effect
catalog.notes: Pipeline forces saves, so it could grant advantage — but only if it knows the source is magical, which often requires GM tagging.

catalog.name: Magic Rope
catalog.triggerDetail: has a magic rope enabling Entangling Rope; rope has its own AC/HP
catalog.effectDetail: grants access to Entangling Rope action; tracks a separate object's HP/immunities/regeneration
catalog.inputsNeeded: tracking rope HP, distance/time conditions, and rest-based restoration
catalog.notes: Enabler + bookkeeping for a separate object. Destruction/restoration conditions (distance, 1 hour, death, rest) are outside the roll pipeline.

catalog.name: Mimicry
catalog.triggerDetail: can mimic simple sounds; hearer discerns with an Insight check
catalog.effectDetail: narrative sound imitation; opposed by a check
catalog.inputsNeeded: none mechanical; purely roleplay/perception adjudication
catalog.notes: No combat-relevant trigger or applied effect in the pipeline's domain.

catalog.name: Mind Invasion
catalog.triggerDetail: dragon uses Spellcasting to cast Mind Spike (level 3)
catalog.effectDetail: casts Mind Spike (Int save, psychic damage, can sense target)
catalog.inputsNeeded: target selection; the linked Mind Spike spell item carries the actual save/damage
catalog.notes: Mind Spike is a save-for-half psychic-damage spell. If the linked spell item is the rolled action, save+resistance-aware damage are in-pipeline; the tracking sense effect is not.

catalog.name: Mind Jolt
catalog.triggerDetail: casts Mind Spike (level 4); can't reuse until start of next turn
catalog.effectDetail: casts Mind Spike (Int save, psychic damage)
catalog.inputsNeeded: target selection; recharge-style once-per-turn lockout tracking
catalog.notes: Same as Mind Invasion at higher level. Save+psychic damage automatable via the spell item; the per-turn usage gate is bookkeeping.

catalog.name: Mind-Rending Roar
catalog.triggerDetail: Wisdom save in an Emanation; Failure: damage + Incapacitated
catalog.effectDetail: Wis save vs damage and Incapacitated until start of monster's next turn
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM picks the targets in the emanation (which the pipeline already supports)
catalog.notes: Forces save, deals resistance-aware damage on fail, applies Incapacitated with a clear turn-bounded duration — fully in-pipeline.

catalog.name: Misty Escape
catalog.triggerDetail: if monster drops to 0 HP outside its resting place, becomes mist
catalog.effectDetail: shape-shift to mist on hitting 0 HP; later regen at resting place; Paralyzed on return
catalog.inputsNeeded: tracking mist form, the 2-hour return window, resting-place location, and delayed Paralyzed/regen
catalog.notes: Pipeline knows damage→0 HP, but the form-change, multi-hour out-of-combat timeline, and conditional destruction are well outside its scope.

catalog.name: Misty Step
catalog.triggerDetail: casts Misty Step (teleport)
catalog.effectDetail: self teleport up to 30 ft to an unoccupied space
catalog.inputsNeeded: destination point for the teleport
catalog.notes: Self-targeted movement/teleport with no save, damage, or condition; the pipeline doesn't move tokens, so at best it flags it — placement is manual.

catalog.name: Moan
catalog.triggerDetail: Wisdom save in Emanation; Failure: Frightened; Success: 24h immunity
catalog.effectDetail: Frightened until end of monster's next turn on failed Wis save
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM picks targets in the emanation
catalog.notes: Force save + apply Frightened with turn-bounded duration is in-pipeline. The 24-hour success immunity is bookkeeping the pipeline likely won't persist, hence not fully clean.

catalog.name: Mockery
catalog.triggerDetail: Wisdom save vs a creature in range; Failure: damage
catalog.effectDetail: Wis save; failure deals (psychic) damage
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets the creature (already supported)
catalog.notes: Single-target save-then-damage — straightforward force-save + resistance-aware damage.

catalog.name: Mucus Cloud
catalog.triggerDetail: while underwater, Con save in Emanation at end of monster's turn; Failure: curse
catalog.effectDetail: curse: breathe air/water, can't heal unless underwater, recurring damage when dry
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM confirms underwater context and targets; the recurring out-of-water damage every 10 min needs manual tracking
catalog.notes: End-of-turn save is in-pipeline and a curse marker could be applied, but the curse's ongoing 10-minute drying damage and no-heal rider are custom long-term effects.

catalog.name: Multiattack
catalog.triggerDetail: makes {count} attacks and uses another action
catalog.effectDetail: sequences multiple weapon attacks plus another listed action
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM/player resolves each sub-attack and target; the template references generic [[/item]] attacks
catalog.notes: Pipeline handles individual attack items; orchestrating the multiattack sequence is mostly a prompt to roll each component, not a single automatable effect.

catalog.name: Multiple Heads
catalog.triggerDetail: 25+ damage in a turn kills a head; regrows heads (unless Fire) at turn end, regaining HP
catalog.effectDetail: tracks head count; regrows heads and regains 20 HP at end of turn unless Fire taken
catalog.inputsNeeded: tracking per-turn damage totals, damage types taken (Fire), head count, and end-of-turn regrowth/heal
catalog.notes: Pipeline knows damage applied + type + turn end, so it has the raw inputs, but the stateful head-count/regrowth/heal logic is custom and not a built-in effect.

catalog.name: Necrotic Bow
catalog.triggerDetail: [[/attack extended]] then [[/damage average extended]]
catalog.effectDetail: weapon attack dealing (necrotic) damage on hit
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets and confirms hit (already in pipeline)
catalog.notes: Standard weapon attack item: attack roll → resistance-aware damage on hit. Core pipeline case.

catalog.name: Necrotic Ray
catalog.triggerDetail: [[/attack extended]] then [[/damage average extended]]
catalog.effectDetail: ranged attack dealing (necrotic) damage on hit
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets and confirms hit
catalog.notes: Plain attack+damage weapon item; fully in-pipeline.

catalog.name: Necrotic Strike
catalog.triggerDetail: makes one Rotting Fist or Channel Negative Energy attack
catalog.effectDetail: chooses one of two named attacks to make
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM/player picks which sub-attack; then resolves that attack item
catalog.notes: A chooser that delegates to one of two other attack items. The chosen attack is automatable, but this feature itself just selects.

catalog.name: Necrotic Sword
catalog.triggerDetail: [[/attack extended]] then [[/damage average extended]]
catalog.effectDetail: melee weapon attack dealing (necrotic) damage on hit
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets and confirms hit
catalog.notes: Standard attack+damage weapon item.

catalog.name: Needle Sword
catalog.triggerDetail: [[/attack extended]] then [[/damage average extended]]
catalog.effectDetail: melee weapon attack dealing (piercing) damage on hit
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets and confirms hit
catalog.notes: Standard attack+damage weapon item; no rider text.

catalog.name: Nightmare
catalog.triggerDetail: Wis save vs one creature in range; Failure: Unconscious if ≤20 HP, else damage
catalog.effectDetail: Wis save; failure applies Unconscious (if HP≤20) or deals damage otherwise
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets; branching on target's current HP (≤20) and Unconscious wake conditions need handling
catalog.notes: Save+damage is in-pipeline, and current HP is knowable, but the conditional Unconscious-vs-damage branch and the 'until it takes damage / woken' end-conditions are custom.

catalog.name: Nightmare Haunting
catalog.triggerDetail: on Ethereal Plane, casts Dream; can reduce HP max and trap soul
catalog.effectDetail: casts Dream with custom riders (HP-max reduction, soul trapping)
catalog.inputsNeeded: out-of-combat/ethereal context, spell interaction checks (Protection/Magic Circle), HP-max reduction and soul-bag tracking
catalog.notes: A modified Dream cast with extensive narrative/long-term riders far outside a per-turn roll pipeline.

catalog.name: Nightmare Ray
catalog.triggerDetail: attack + damage, and target is Frightened until start of monster's next turn
catalog.effectDetail: weapon attack: damage on hit plus Frightened (turn-bounded)
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets and confirms hit
catalog.notes: Attack+damage with an on-hit Frightened rider and clear turn-bounded duration — all in-pipeline.

catalog.name: Nimble Escape
catalog.triggerDetail: takes the Disengage or Hide action
catalog.effectDetail: uses Disengage or Hide (as a bonus action in the statblock)
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM choice of Disengage vs Hide; movement/stealth resolution
catalog.notes: Grants action economy (Disengage/Hide). No save, damage, or applicable condition — outside the pipeline's effect set.

catalog.name: Noxious Miasma
catalog.triggerDetail: Con save in a Sphere; Failure: damage + −2 AC; then once-per-turn lockout
catalog.effectDetail: Con save; failure deals damage and applies −2 AC penalty until end of target's next turn
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM places the sphere/targets it; once-per-turn usage gate is minor bookkeeping
catalog.notes: Force save + resistance-aware damage + temporary −2 AC debuff (a condition/effect the pipeline can apply) with a turn-bounded duration. 'Can't use again until next turn' is light tracking.

catalog.name: Ocean Spear
catalog.triggerDetail: attack + damage; if creature, Speed −10 ft until end of its next turn; spear returns
catalog.effectDetail: weapon attack: damage on hit plus Speed −10 ft (turn-bounded); spear auto-returns
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets and confirms hit
catalog.notes: Attack+damage with an on-hit speed-reduction rider (applicable as an effect) and clear duration. The 'spear returns to hand' clause is pure flavor with no mechanical tracking.

catalog.name: Onslaught
catalog.triggerDetail: moves up to half its Speed, and makes one Claw or Tail attack
catalog.effectDetail: Move + one Claw or Tail attack (Bonus Action style action)
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM picks Claw vs Tail and the movement; the attack itself runs through the normal item pipeline
catalog.notes: Movement isn't pipeline-controlled and the GM chooses which attack item to use. The follow-up attack is automatable as a normal action card; the prompt to make it is the automatable part.

catalog.name: Ooze Cube
catalog.triggerDetail: fills its space; creatures entering are subjected to Engulf; provides Total Cover
catalog.effectDetail: Spatial/grappling-engulf body trait with Disadvantage on Engulf save and a STR(Athletics) DC 12 extraction sub-action dealing damage
catalog.inputsNeeded: Whether a creature entered the space, who is held inside, pull-out attempts and positioning — all spatial/GM-adjudicated
catalog.notes: Depends on movement-into-space detection and tracking occupants inside the ooze, which the DDB/GM pipeline doesn't model. The embedded DC 12 check + damage could be a manual card but the trait as a whole is positional.

catalog.name: Pack Tactics
catalog.triggerDetail: Advantage on attack roll if a non-Incapacitated ally is within 5 feet of the target
catalog.effectDetail: Advantage on this creature's attack rolls (conditional on ally adjacency)
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM/player must confirm an ally is within 5 ft of the target and not Incapacitated; the attack roll happens client-side in DDB
catalog.notes: The roll is made in D&D Beyond before the card arrives, so the pipeline can't inject Advantage. At best it can remind the GM/player of the condition. Adjacency is spatial and not tracked.

catalog.name: Pact Blade
catalog.triggerDetail: [[/attack extended]] ... [[/damage average extended]]
catalog.effectDetail: Standard weapon attack: attack roll then damage on hit
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets the token; hit/miss and damage flow through the normal pipeline
catalog.notes: Plain weapon attack with no rider. Fully covered by attacker+item, target, hit confirm, damage applied.

catalog.name: Paralyzing Breath
catalog.triggerDetail: Constitution save, each creature in a Cone (breath weapon)
catalog.effectDetail: First failure: Incapacitated until end of next turn (repeat save then); second failure: Paralyzed with repeated end-of-turn saves, auto-success after 1 minute
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM places the Cone / selects targets; pipeline forces CON saves and applies Incapacitated/Paralyzed
catalog.notes: Forced save + condition application is squarely in-pipeline. Complications: escalating first/second-failure tiering, the recurring end-of-turn re-saves, and the 1-minute auto-success need ongoing tracking. Cone target selection is GM-mediated.

catalog.name: Paralyzing Tentacles
catalog.triggerDetail: Dexterity save, one creature within range
catalog.effectDetail: On failure: Poisoned (repeat save each turn-end; auto-success after duration); while Poisoned the target is also Paralyzed
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets the creature; pipeline forces DEX save and applies Poisoned (and linked Paralyzed)
catalog.notes: Single-target forced save + condition is automatable. The nested 'while Poisoned -> Paralyzed' linkage and recurring saves-until-duration need an active-effect with end-of-turn re-save tracking the pipeline only partly supports.

catalog.name: Paralyzing Touch
catalog.triggerDetail: [[/attack]] then [[/damage]], and target is Paralyzed until start of monster's next turn
catalog.effectDetail: Attack damage on hit plus Paralyzed until start of attacker's next turn
catalog.inputsNeeded: None beyond the normal target/hit confirm; condition applies on hit with a fixed turn-start duration
catalog.notes: Attack-with-rider: on a confirmed hit, apply damage and the Paralyzed condition with a clear start-of-next-turn expiry. No save, no GM branch.

catalog.name: Parry
catalog.triggerDetail: Trigger: the monster is hit by an attack; Response: adds a bonus to AC against that attack
catalog.effectDetail: Reactive +AC against the triggering attack, possibly turning a hit into a miss
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM decides to use the reaction; pipeline must re-evaluate whether the now-higher AC still beats the attack roll
catalog.notes: Pipeline knows onBeingHit and the attack total, so it could recompute hit/miss after the AC bonus and retract the hit. Requires the original attack roll value and a GM trigger; only partially supported since it mutates an already-resolved DDB attack.

catalog.name: Petrifying Bite
catalog.triggerDetail: Attack + damage; if target is a creature, CON save with escalating petrification
catalog.effectDetail: Damage on hit, then CON save: first failure Restrained (repeat save end of next turn), second failure Petrified instead
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM confirms hit; pipeline applies damage, forces CON save, applies Restrained/Petrified
catalog.notes: Hit -> damage -> forced save -> condition is in-pipeline. The first/second-failure escalation and the end-of-next-turn re-save (Restrained -> Petrified) require tracking state across saves.

catalog.name: Petrifying Breath
catalog.triggerDetail: Constitution save, each creature in a Cone (breath weapon)
catalog.effectDetail: First failure Restrained (repeat save end of next turn); second failure Petrified instead
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM places Cone / selects targets; pipeline forces CON saves and applies Restrained/Petrified
catalog.notes: Forced save + condition over an area is automatable; escalating two-failure petrification and the recurring re-save need ongoing per-target state. Cone targeting is GM-mediated.

catalog.name: Petrifying Gaze
catalog.triggerDetail: Constitution save, each creature in an Emanation; also self-affects on seeing reflection
catalog.effectDetail: First failure Restrained (repeat save end of next turn); second failure Petrified; reflection clause turns gaze on the monster
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM decides who is in range/can see the gaze and resolves the reflection clause; pipeline forces saves and applies conditions
catalog.notes: Gaze auras depend on line-of-sight and 'who can see whom', which is GM-adjudicated, plus the self-targeting reflection edge case. The forced-save-and-condition core is automatable once targets are chosen.

catalog.name: Phantasms
catalog.triggerDetail: Casts Mirror Image; ends early if monster starts/ends turn in Bright Light
catalog.effectDetail: Self-buff (illusory duplicates); no save, no damage, light-based early end
catalog.inputsNeeded: Resolving Mirror Image's duplicate mechanic and the Bright Light end-condition is outside the damage/save/condition pipeline
catalog.notes: Spell-as-feature with a bespoke duplicate-tracking mechanic and an environmental (light) end trigger. The pipeline can fire the cast but can't model Mirror Image's effect. Could log/flag only.

catalog.name: Pincer
catalog.triggerDetail: Attack + damage; if target is Large or smaller it is Grappled (escape DC = passive Athletics)
catalog.effectDetail: Damage on hit plus Grappled with a fixed escape DC
catalog.inputsNeeded: None beyond normal hit confirm; size gate is checkable from the target token
catalog.notes: Attack-with-rider: on hit apply damage and the Grappled condition. Size check (Large or smaller) is readable; escape DC is a static value. No forced save at application time.

catalog.name: Poison Breath
catalog.triggerDetail: Constitution save, each creature in an area; Failure full damage, Success half
catalog.effectDetail: Save-for-half Poison damage in a Cone/area
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM places the template / selects targets; pipeline forces CON saves and applies resistance-aware half-on-success damage
catalog.notes: Classic save-for-half breath weapon — forced save plus resistance-aware damage with half-on-success is exactly what the pipeline does. Only the area target selection is GM-mediated.

catalog.name: Poison Burst
catalog.triggerDetail: [[/attack extended]] ... [[/damage average extended]]
catalog.effectDetail: Standard attack: attack roll then damage on hit
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets the token; hit/miss and damage flow through the normal pipeline
catalog.notes: Plain attack with no rider in the text. Fully covered by attacker+item, target, hit confirm, resistance-aware damage.

catalog.name: Poison Ray
catalog.triggerDetail: [[/attack extended]] ... [[/damage average extended]]
catalog.effectDetail: Standard ranged attack: attack roll then damage on hit
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets the token; hit/miss and damage flow through the normal pipeline
catalog.notes: Plain attack with no rider. Fully covered by the standard hit+damage flow.

catalog.name: Poisonous Spittle
catalog.triggerDetail: Constitution save, a creature within range; Failure damage + Blinded, Success half damage
catalog.effectDetail: Save-for-half Poison damage (7d8) plus Blinded until start of monster's next turn on failure
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets the creature; pipeline forces CON save, applies half-on-success damage and Blinded on failure
catalog.notes: Single-target forced save with damage-and-condition rider: full damage + Blinded on fail, half damage on success. Blinded has a clean turn-start expiry. All in-pipeline.

catalog.name: Possession
catalog.triggerDetail: Charisma save, one humanoid within range; failure = target possessed and Incapacitated
catalog.effectDetail: On failure target is possessed: Incapacitated, loses body control, monster takes over stats/Speed; bespoke takeover with many sub-rules and 24h immunity
catalog.inputsNeeded: Forcing the CON... Charisma save is automatable, but resolving the possession (stat swap, control transfer, untargetable monster, end conditions, immunity) requires GM adjudication
catalog.notes: The save and the Incapacitated tag are pipeline-friendly, but the core effect — one creature controlling another's body with substituted statistics and multiple end/immunity clauses — is far outside damage/condition automation.

catalog.name: Pounce
catalog.triggerDetail: moves up to half its Speed, and makes one Rend attack
catalog.effectDetail: Move + one Rend attack (action that bundles movement and a single attack)
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM performs the movement; the Rend attack runs as a normal item attack card
catalog.notes: Movement isn't pipeline-controlled, but the bundled Rend attack is a standard item attack. The /item Rend reference resolves to a known attack item, so the attack half is automatable.

catalog.name: Probing Telepathy
catalog.triggerDetail: If a creature communicates telepathically with the monster, it learns the creature's greatest desires
catalog.effectDetail: Pure information/roleplay trait; no mechanical effect
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM narration; nothing for the pipeline to apply
catalog.notes: No save, damage, or condition. Information-only trait with no mechanical hook for the card pipeline.

catalog.name: Proboscis
catalog.triggerDetail: Attack + Necrotic damage; target's Hit Point maximum decreases by the Necrotic damage taken
catalog.effectDetail: Damage on hit plus a Hit Point maximum reduction equal to the necrotic damage dealt
catalog.inputsNeeded: Pipeline knows the necrotic damage dealt; applying an HP-maximum reduction (not normal damage) may need a manual/active-effect step
catalog.notes: Closest effect bucket is a debuff to the target (max-HP reduction). Damage applies cleanly; the max-HP decrease is a derived stat change tied to the damage amount that most damage-application pipelines don't set automatically. Not item/equipment related despite the effect label.

catalog.name: Protection
catalog.triggerDetail: Trigger: an attack hits the amulet's wearer within 5 ft; Response: wearer gains +5 AC including vs the triggering attack
catalog.effectDetail: Reactive +5 AC to a nearby ally (the amulet wearer) against the triggering and subsequent attacks until the monster's next turn
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM triggers the reaction and identifies the amulet wearer; pipeline must recompute the triggering attack vs the new AC
catalog.notes: Like Parry but protecting a different token (the wearer) and conditional on 5-ft adjacency. Pipeline can re-evaluate hit/miss with +5 AC if given the attack total, but adjacency and the wearer relationship are GM-supplied.

catalog.name: Protective Magic
catalog.triggerDetail: Casts Counterspell or Shield in response to the spell's trigger
catalog.effectDetail: Reactive spellcasting: negate an incoming spell (Counterspell) or boost own AC (Shield)
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM chooses which spell and resolves Counterspell's ability check / Shield's AC bump against the trigger
catalog.notes: Reaction spellcasting with a GM choice between two spells, one of which (Counterspell) cancels another spell entirely. Outside the attack/save/damage pipeline; the card can flag the option but not resolve it.

catalog.name: Prowl (Tiger or Hybrid Form Only)
catalog.triggerDetail: moves up to its Speed without provoking Opportunity Attacks, then can take the Hide action
catalog.effectDetail: Full-speed move ignoring opportunity attacks, optionally ending with a Hide action
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM moves the token and resolves Hide (Stealth check vs perception); no damage/save/condition for the pipeline
catalog.notes: Movement + Hide is positional and stealth-based, entirely GM-adjudicated. The pipeline has no movement or hide handling.

catalog.name: Pseudopod
catalog.triggerDetail: [[/attack extended]] ... [[/damage average extended]]
catalog.effectDetail: Standard melee attack: attack roll then damage on hit
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets the token; hit/miss and damage flow through the normal pipeline
catalog.notes: Plain attack with no rider in the text. Fully covered by attacker+item, target, hit confirm, resistance-aware damage.

catalog.name: Psychic Drain
catalog.triggerDetail: if it has at least one creature Charmed or Grappled, it uses Consume Memories
catalog.effectDetail: regains average healing; also invokes the Consume Memories action
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM confirms a target is currently Charmed or Grappled, and resolves the nested Consume Memories action
catalog.notes: Pipeline knows applied conditions and can heal, but 'uses Consume Memories' is a separate nested action it cannot itself trigger; gated heal only.

catalog.name: Pummel
catalog.triggerDetail: Dexterity Saving Throw, one creature Grappled by the monster
catalog.effectDetail: Dex save, full damage on failure, half on success
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets the creature already Grappled by the monster
catalog.notes: Standard save-for-half damage; pipeline forces the save and applies resistance-aware damage. Only prerequisite is GM picking the Grappled target.

catalog.name: Pursuit
catalog.triggerDetail: another creature it can see ends its move within range
catalog.effectDetail: monster uses Teleport, destination constrained
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM chooses Teleport destination space
catalog.notes: Self-teleport/movement of the monster is outside the pipeline (it applies effects to targets, not move the attacker). Trigger is detectable but no applicable effect.

catalog.name: Quick Grapple
catalog.triggerDetail: Dexterity Saving Throw, creature it can see within range
catalog.effectDetail: on failure, target gains the Grappled condition (escape DC = passive Athletics)
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets the creature(s)
catalog.notes: forceSave then apply Grappled on fail — both in pipeline. No damage, pure condition-on-failed-save.

catalog.name: Radiant Flame
catalog.triggerDetail: attack then damage
catalog.effectDetail: weapon attack roll + damage
catalog.notes: Plain weapon attack item — the canonical hit/damage path the pipeline owns.

catalog.name: Radiant Horn
catalog.triggerDetail: attack then damage
catalog.effectDetail: weapon attack roll + damage
catalog.notes: Plain weapon attack item; standard attack/damage flow.

catalog.name: Radiant Sword
catalog.triggerDetail: attack then damage
catalog.effectDetail: weapon attack roll + damage
catalog.notes: Plain weapon attack item; standard attack/damage flow.

catalog.name: Radiant Teleport
catalog.triggerDetail: teleports up to range, then Dex save Emanation at destination
catalog.effectDetail: self-teleport, then Dex save for-half AoE damage from destination
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM chooses teleport destination and targets in the Emanation
catalog.notes: Self-teleport (movement of attacker) not in pipeline; the subsequent save-for-half damage burst IS automatable once GM places it and picks targets.

catalog.name: Rake
catalog.triggerDetail: attack then damage
catalog.effectDetail: weapon attack roll + damage
catalog.notes: Plain weapon attack item; standard attack/damage flow.

catalog.name: Ram
catalog.triggerDetail: attack + damage; if target is a [size] creature it is knocked Prone
catalog.effectDetail: damage on hit, plus Prone on a qualifying-size target
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM confirms target meets the size restriction for the rider
catalog.notes: Attack+damage is core; Prone-on-hit rider is applicable since pipeline applies conditions. Only the size eligibility check needs GM eyes.

catalog.name: Rampage
catalog.triggerDetail: immediately after dealing damage to a creature already Bloodied
catalog.effectDetail: move up to half Speed and make one extra attack
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM confirms the damaged creature was already Bloodied; GM moves the monster and resolves the bonus attack
catalog.notes: Pipeline sees damage dealt and can flag the Bloodied trigger, but the self-movement and the extra attack are GM-resolved follow-ups.

catalog.name: Reactive
catalog.triggerDetail: can take one Reaction on every turn of combat
catalog.effectDetail: expands reaction economy; no direct mechanical application
catalog.notes: Pure economy modifier — nothing for the pipeline to apply (it doesn't track/enforce reaction counts). Informational only.

catalog.name: Reactive Heads
catalog.triggerDetail: extra Reaction per head beyond one, usable only for Opportunity Attacks
catalog.effectDetail: grants extra reactions restricted to OAs; no direct effect to apply
catalog.notes: Reaction-economy buff; pipeline has no reaction-count tracking to automate. Informational only.

catalog.name: Read Thoughts
catalog.triggerDetail: casts Detect Thoughts (Charisma-based)
catalog.effectDetail: casts the Detect Thoughts spell, no components
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM resolves the spell and its ongoing effects
catalog.notes: Casting an out-of-pipeline utility spell; not a hit/save/damage/condition the roll-card flow handles.

catalog.name: Redirect Attack
catalog.triggerDetail: a creature it can see makes an attack roll against it
catalog.effectDetail: swap places with a chosen creature, which becomes the attack's target instead
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM chooses the swap creature and re-points the attack
catalog.notes: Position swap plus retargeting an in-flight attack — neither moving tokens nor reassigning an attack's target is in the pipeline.

catalog.name: Reel
catalog.triggerDetail: pulls a creature Restrained by its Web Strand up to 25 feet toward itself
catalog.effectDetail: forced pull of a Restrained target 25 ft straight toward the monster
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM confirms the target is Restrained by Web Strand and performs the forced move
catalog.notes: Forced movement of a target is not something the pipeline applies; no save/damage component to automate.

catalog.name: Reflective Carapace
catalog.triggerDetail: targeted by Magic Missile or a spell requiring a ranged attack roll; roll 1d6
catalog.effectDetail: on 1-5 unaffected; on 6 unaffected and reflects spell back at caster
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM rolls the d6 and, on a 6, re-targets the spell at the caster
catalog.notes: Conditional spell-negation/reflection on specific spell types; retargeting a spell back at the caster is outside the pipeline.

catalog.name: Reflexive Antennae
catalog.triggerDetail: an attack roll hits the monster
catalog.effectDetail: monster uses its Antennae action in response
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM resolves the nested Antennae action
catalog.notes: Pipeline detects the on-being-hit trigger, but the response is to invoke a separate Antennae action it cannot itself execute; would prompt the GM.

catalog.name: Regeneration
catalog.triggerDetail: start of each of its turns if it has at least 1 Hit Point
catalog.effectDetail: regains a fixed amount of HP at turn start
catalog.notes: Pipeline knows turn start and can heal; the >=1 HP guard and any stop-condition (e.g., fire/acid) are simple checks. SRD text here has no damage-type caveat.

catalog.name: Rend
catalog.triggerDetail: attack then damage
catalog.effectDetail: weapon attack roll + damage
catalog.notes: Plain weapon attack item; standard attack/damage flow.

catalog.name: Repulsion Breath
catalog.triggerDetail: Strength Saving Throw, each creature in a Cone
catalog.effectDetail: on failure: pushed 30 ft away and knocked Prone
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM applies the forced 30-ft push (and places template/targets)
catalog.notes: forceSave and Prone-on-fail are in pipeline; the 30-ft forced push is movement the pipeline doesn't perform. Half the rider is automatable.

catalog.name: Restless Touch
catalog.triggerDetail: attack + damage, and the target is cursed for 24 hours
catalog.effectDetail: damage plus a 24h curse denying Short Rest benefits
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM tracks the non-standard curse and its Short Rest denial over 24h
catalog.notes: Attack+damage automatable; the curse is a custom, non-SRD-condition effect lasting beyond combat, best applied as a flagged effect with GM tracking.

catalog.name: Riposte
catalog.triggerDetail: hit by a melee attack roll while holding a weapon
catalog.effectDetail: +3 AC vs that attack (may cause miss); on a miss, makes one Rapier attack
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM enables the +3 AC Active Effect, re-evaluates the hit, and on a miss resolves the Rapier attack
catalog.notes: Foundry note says the AC bump is a manual AE. Pipeline can confirm the melee hit and resolve the follow-up Rapier attack, but applying +3 retroactively and re-checking the original hit is GM-driven.

catalog.name: Ritual Sickle
catalog.triggerDetail: attack then damage
catalog.effectDetail: weapon attack roll + damage
catalog.notes: Plain weapon attack item; standard attack/damage flow.

catalog.name: Roar
catalog.triggerDetail: magical roar with a different effect each use; sequence resets on a Long Rest
catalog.effectDetail: First: Wis save or Frightened; Second: Wis save or Paralyzed (repeat saves); Third: Con save for-half damage and Prone
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM tracks which roar in the sequence is active; targets the Emanation each time
catalog.notes: Each individual roar (save + condition, or save-for-half damage + Prone) is automatable, but the pipeline must know which of the three sequenced variants applies and handle the repeat-save/auto-success on Paralyzed.

catalog.name: Rock
catalog.triggerDetail: weapon attack: [[/attack extended]]
catalog.effectDetail: attack roll then average damage
catalog.notes: Plain ranged/melee weapon attack. Pipeline knows attacker+item, hit/miss, damage applied.

catalog.name: Rock Launch
catalog.triggerDetail: If the target is a Large or smaller creature
catalog.effectDetail: Prone on a Large-or-smaller target after the hit
catalog.inputsNeeded: Confirm/judge target size is Large or smaller before applying Prone
catalog.notes: Attack+damage fully automatable; Prone rider is size-gated, no save — GM confirms size eligibility, then condition applies.

catalog.name: Rotting Fist
catalog.triggerDetail: If the target is a creature, it is cursed
catalog.effectDetail: curse: no HP regain, HP max won't reset on Long Rest, -3d6 HP max/24h; dies & turns to dust if dropped to 0 by this attack
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM to track/apply the ongoing 24h HP-max decay and the no-regain/Long-Rest restriction; pipeline can apply the curse flag and the death-to-dust at 0 HP
catalog.notes: On-hit attack+damage automatable; death-to-dust at 0 HP detectable from damage-applied. The persistent curse (recurring 3d6 HP-max loss every 24h, blocked regain) is a long-duration bookkeeping effect outside a single roll card.

catalog.name: Rotting Touch
catalog.triggerDetail: weapon attack: [[/attack extended]]
catalog.effectDetail: attack roll then average damage
catalog.notes: Plain weapon attack with damage only.

catalog.name: Running Leap
catalog.triggerDetail: With a 10-foot running start, can Long Jump up to 25 feet
catalog.effectDetail: extended long-jump distance
catalog.notes: Movement-capability modifier resolved by positioning the token; not an attack/save/damage event the pipeline acts on.

catalog.name: Scare
catalog.triggerDetail: Wisdom Saving Throw, one creature within range
catalog.effectDetail: Frightened on failed save; repeats save end of each turn, auto-succeeds after 1 min

catalog.notes: forceSave + apply Frightened on fail is automatable (pipeline forces save and applies conditions). The recurring end-of-turn save to end it is a multi-turn loop the GM/automation must keep prompting.

catalog.name: Scorching Sands

catalog.effectDetail: damage on fail plus Speed halved until end of its next turn; can't reuse until start of its next turn
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets the creature(s); track Speed-halved until end of next turn and the recharge-until-start-of-next-turn lockout
catalog.notes: forceSave + damage-on-fail automatable. Speed-halved is a short debuff and the self lockout is a once-per-turn timing the GM tracks.

catalog.name: Scratch
catalog.triggerDetail: weapon attack: [[/attack extended]]
catalog.effectDetail: attack roll then average damage
catalog.notes: Plain weapon attack with damage only.

catalog.name: Searing Fork
catalog.triggerDetail: weapon attack: [[/attack extended]]
catalog.effectDetail: attack roll then average damage
catalog.notes: Plain weapon attack with damage only.

catalog.name: Sense Magic
catalog.triggerDetail: senses magic within 120 feet, like Detect Magic but not magical
catalog.effectDetail: detection/sensory trait
catalog.notes: Information/perception trait. No roll, damage, save, or condition for the pipeline to act on.

catalog.name: Shadow Stealth
catalog.triggerDetail: While in Dim Light or Darkness, takes the Hide action
catalog.effectDetail: grants Hide action in dim light/darkness
catalog.notes: Enables the Hide action under lighting conditions; stealth/Hidden state is not part of the attack/damage/save pipeline.

catalog.name: Shape-Shift
catalog.triggerDetail: shape-shifts into another form or returns to true form
catalog.effectDetail: polymorph/transform; stats same except size, equipment not transformed
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM chooses target form and swaps token/size
catalog.notes: Token/size/form swap. Not a damage/save/condition event; outside the roll-card pipeline's effects.

catalog.name: Shark Telepathy
catalog.triggerDetail: magically control sharks within 120 feet via special telepathy
catalog.effectDetail: control/communicate with sharks
catalog.notes: Narrative control/communication trait. No mechanical roll for the pipeline.

catalog.name: Shield Bash
catalog.triggerDetail: Strength Saving Throw, one target within range
catalog.effectDetail: damage on fail; Prone if target is Medium or smaller
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM picks target; confirm target is Medium or smaller for the Prone rider
catalog.notes: forceSave + damage-on-fail automatable; Prone is size-gated (Medium or smaller) so GM confirms eligibility before condition applies.

catalog.name: Shielded Mind
catalog.triggerDetail: thoughts can't be read; telepathy only if it allows
catalog.effectDetail: anti-telepathy/mind-reading immunity
catalog.notes: Pure defensive narrative trait; nothing for the pipeline to roll or apply.

catalog.name: Shimmering Shield
catalog.triggerDetail: targets itself or one creature it can see within range
catalog.effectDetail: grants temp HP plus +2 AC until end of monster's next turn; can't reuse until start of its next turn
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM picks the target (self or ally); track +2 AC buff duration and the once-per-turn lockout
catalog.notes: Temp HP grant is automatable. The +2 AC buff (timed to end of next turn) and self lockout are short-duration buff bookkeeping; pipeline can apply temp HP but AC-buff tracking is GM/automation managed.

catalog.name: Shock
catalog.triggerDetail: weapon attack: [[/attack extended]]
catalog.effectDetail: attack roll then average damage
catalog.notes: Plain weapon attack with damage only.

catalog.name: Shred
catalog.triggerDetail: weapon attack: [[/attack extended]]
catalog.effectDetail: attack roll then average damage
catalog.notes: Plain weapon attack with damage only.

catalog.name: Shriek
catalog.triggerDetail: Trigger: a creature or source of Bright Light moves within range
catalog.effectDetail: emits an audible shriek (alarm) for 1 minute or until it dies
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM judges the trigger (movement/Bright Light within range)
catalog.notes: Reaction triggered on onMove/light-source; effect is just a sustained alarm noise — no damage, save, or condition for the pipeline to apply.

catalog.name: Siege Monster
catalog.triggerDetail: deals double damage to objects and structures
catalog.effectDetail: damage doubling vs objects/structures
catalog.notes: Passive damage modifier that applies only to objects/structures, which aren't GM-targeted tokens with hit/damage tracking in this pipeline. Doubling vs objects is GM-adjudicated.

catalog.name: Slam
catalog.triggerDetail: weapon attack: [[/attack extended]]
catalog.effectDetail: attack roll then average damage
catalog.notes: Plain weapon attack with damage only.

catalog.name: Slash
catalog.triggerDetail: weapon attack: [[/attack extended]]
catalog.effectDetail: attack roll then average damage
catalog.notes: Plain weapon attack with damage only.

catalog.name: Slaying Bow
catalog.triggerDetail: Dexterity Saving Throw, one creature it can see within range
catalog.effectDetail: on fail: instant death if target has 100 HP or fewer, otherwise takes damage
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM picks target; pipeline checks target's current HP <=100 to choose death vs damage on a failed save
catalog.notes: forceSave automatable. The fail branch needs the target's current HP (known to pipeline as damage-applied/HP) to decide instant-death vs damage — automatable if HP threshold check is available, hence partial.

catalog.name: Sleep
catalog.triggerDetail: casts the Sleep spell (Cha, spell save DC)
catalog.effectDetail: Sleep spell effect (Incapacitated/Unconscious per spell)
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets the area/creatures; resolve the linked Sleep spell's saves and conditions
catalog.notes: Innate spellcast delegating to the Sleep spell item. Automatable only insofar as the referenced spell's own save/condition automation runs; the cast itself is an action with GM targeting.

catalog.name: Sleep Breath
catalog.triggerDetail: Constitution Saving Throw, each creature in a Cone (breath weapon)
catalog.effectDetail: fail: Incapacitated until end of next turn then repeat save; second failure: Unconscious 1 min; ends if damaged or woken
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM picks targets in the cone; track the repeat save at end of next turn (Incapacitated->Unconscious escalation) and the wake-on-damage clause
catalog.notes: forceSave + apply Incapacitated on first fail automatable. The two-stage escalation (repeat save -> Unconscious), the 1-min duration, and ending on damage/wake are multi-turn condition bookkeeping the GM/automation tracks.

catalog.name: Slow
catalog.triggerDetail: casts the Slow spell (DC 17)
catalog.effectDetail: Con save vs Slow spell; on fail target's actions/speed are reduced (concentration)
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM picks the up-to-six targets for the spell; concentration tracking and the multi-faceted Slow effect (halved speed, no reactions, one action) must be managed by the GM/dnd5e spell, not the card pipeline
catalog.notes: Pipeline can force the Con save (DC 17) and apply a slowed-style condition, but Slow is a 6-target concentration spell with several simultaneous restrictions, so full automation is limited to firing the save.

catalog.name: Slowing Breath
catalog.triggerDetail: each creature in a Cone makes a Con save
catalog.effectDetail: on fail: no reactions, speed halved, only action OR bonus action until end of its next turn
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM selects the tokens in the cone template
catalog.notes: Save is forceable per target. The fail effect is a compound, duration-limited debuff (no exact 5e condition) — the pipeline can flag it but the action-economy restriction needs GM enforcement.

catalog.name: Smother
catalog.triggerDetail: attack, or instead grapple a Medium or smaller creature
catalog.effectDetail: deal damage, OR grapple → Blinded+Restrained+Suffocating and recurring damage at start of its turns
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM chooses damage vs grapple, target size eligibility, and the ongoing per-turn damage / shared-damage handling each round
catalog.notes: Attack+damage branch is fully automatable. The grapple branch applies Grappled/Blinded/Restrained (pipeline can apply conditions) but the start-of-turn recurring damage, escape DC, and damage-halving/shared-damage while grappling need ongoing GM mediation.

catalog.name: Snake Hair
catalog.triggerDetail: [[/attack]] [[/damage]]
catalog.effectDetail: weapon attack, hit confirmed and damage applied
catalog.notes: Plain weapon attack item — attacker, hit/miss, and typed damage are exactly what the pipeline drives.

catalog.name: Sonic Boom
catalog.triggerDetail: casts Shatter; can't again until start of next turn
catalog.effectDetail: Shatter: Con save in area, thunder damage (half on success)
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM selects creatures in the Shatter area
catalog.notes: Pipeline can force the Con save and apply resistance-aware thunder damage on fail/half on success. The 'once per round' recharge-style gating is self-imposed and tracked by the GM.

catalog.name: Soul Bag
catalog.triggerDetail: has a soul bag enabling Nightmare Haunting
catalog.effectDetail: the bag is an object with AC 15/HP 20/resistance; gates another action
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM tracks the bag object, its HP/destruction, and soul release
catalog.notes: Narrative/object-bookkeeping feature; not an attack/save/turn-boundary event the card pipeline sees. No automatable trigger.

catalog.name: Speak with Beasts and Plants
catalog.triggerDetail: can communicate with Beasts and Plants
catalog.effectDetail: roleplay communication ability
catalog.notes: Pure roleplay capability with no mechanical hook for the pipeline.

catalog.name: Spell Storing
catalog.triggerDetail: amulet can store one spell of level 4 or lower
catalog.effectDetail: stores a spell to be cast later with the original caster's parameters
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM manages which spell is stored and its later casting
catalog.notes: Storage/setup mechanic; the eventual cast would be its own action. Nothing for the card pipeline to fire on its own.

catalog.name: Spellcasting
catalog.triggerDetail: casts one of the following spells (At Will / X per Day)
catalog.effectDetail: generic spellcasting block; specific spells vary per stat block
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM chooses which spell to cast and its targets; effect depends entirely on the chosen spell
catalog.notes: Template feature with placeholders ({spell}, {ability}). Automatability is per-spell; as written it's a chooser, so the pipeline can at best fire the individual spell's save/attack once selected.

catalog.name: Spider Climb
catalog.triggerDetail: can climb difficult surfaces and ceilings without a check
catalog.effectDetail: always-on climb/ceiling movement
catalog.notes: Passive movement capability; no event the pipeline triggers on. Effect tagged movement for catalog completeness.

catalog.name: Spirit Jar
catalog.triggerDetail: if destroyed, reforms in 1d10 days if it has a spirit jar
catalog.effectDetail: revives at full HP in its lair after 1d10 days
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM adjudicates the spirit jar's existence and the days-later revival
catalog.notes: Triggers on death but the response is a delayed (1d10 days) off-screen revival — outside the in-combat card pipeline's scope.

catalog.name: Spiritual Weapon
catalog.triggerDetail: casts the Spiritual Weapon spell
catalog.effectDetail: conjures a floating weapon that makes melee spell attacks for force damage
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM places/controls the conjured weapon and makes its attacks each turn
catalog.notes: The weapon's individual attacks (attack roll + force damage) are automatable as attack items, but conjuring/positioning the persistent spiritual weapon is a GM-managed summon.

catalog.name: Split
catalog.triggerDetail: Trigger: while the monster [meets a condition, e.g. is subjected to certain damage]; Response: splits into two
catalog.effectDetail: splits into two smaller copies, dividing current HP
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM spawns the two new (one-size-smaller) tokens, divides HP, and sets their initiative
catalog.notes: Reaction keyed to being damaged (ooze-style split). The pipeline sees onDamaged, but the response is token creation/duplication and HP division, which the pipeline can't do — GM-mediated.

catalog.name: Spores
catalog.triggerDetail: each creature in an Emanation makes a Con save
catalog.effectDetail: on fail: Poisoned (repeat save end of turn) and recurring damage at start of each of its turns
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM selects creatures in the emanation; the repeating end-of-turn save and start-of-turn recurring damage are tracked over multiple rounds
catalog.notes: Initial Con save and Poisoned condition are automatable. The ongoing per-turn damage, recurring save, and Holy Water early-end clause require GM management round to round.

catalog.name: Standing Leap
catalog.triggerDetail: Long Jump 20 ft / High Jump 10 ft with or without a running start
catalog.effectDetail: fixed jump distances
catalog.notes: Passive movement modifier; nothing for the pipeline to fire on.

catalog.name: Steam Breath
catalog.triggerDetail: each target in a Cone makes a Con save
catalog.effectDetail: fire damage (half on success); underwater grants no resistance
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM selects the tokens in the cone template
catalog.notes: Classic save-for-half breath. Pipeline forces the Con save and applies resistance-aware fire damage (full/half). The 'underwater doesn't grant resistance' rider is an edge the GM confirms.

catalog.name: Stench
catalog.triggerDetail: any creature that starts its turn in the Emanation makes a Con save
catalog.effectDetail: on fail: Poisoned until start of its next turn; on success: immune to this Stench for 1 hour
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM confirms which creatures start their turn within the emanation (and tracks the 1-hour success immunity)
catalog.notes: Turn-start aura — pipeline can force the Con save at turnStart and apply Poisoned, but it must know who is in the emanation and remember per-creature 1-hour immunity after a success.

catalog.name: Sting
catalog.triggerDetail: [[/attack]] [[/damage]]
catalog.effectDetail: weapon attack, hit confirmed and damage applied
catalog.notes: Plain weapon attack item — fully covered by attacker/hit/damage pipeline.

catalog.name: Stone Club
catalog.triggerDetail: [[/attack]] [[/damage]]
catalog.effectDetail: weapon attack, hit confirmed and damage applied
catalog.notes: Plain weapon attack item — fully covered by the pipeline.

catalog.name: Storm Blade
catalog.triggerDetail: [[/attack]] [[/damage]]
catalog.effectDetail: weapon attack, hit confirmed and damage applied
catalog.notes: Plain weapon attack item (desc carries no rider) — fully covered by the pipeline.

catalog.name: Storm Bolt

catalog.effectDetail: ranged attack dealing damage, plus Prone on a Large-or-smaller target
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM/pipeline applies Prone only if target is Large or smaller (size check)
catalog.notes: Attack roll + typed damage + Prone condition on hit are all within the pipeline; only the size gate on Prone needs a simple check.

catalog.name: Storm Sword
catalog.triggerDetail: [[/attack]] [[/damage]]
catalog.effectDetail: weapon attack, hit confirmed and damage applied
catalog.notes: Plain weapon attack item — fully covered by the pipeline.

catalog.name: Stunning Screech

catalog.effectDetail: on fail: damage and Stunned until end of the monster's next turn
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM selects creatures in the emanation and applies the demon auto-success exception
catalog.notes: Pipeline forces the Con save, applies damage, and applies Stunned with the stated duration. The 'demons succeed automatically' creature-type carve-out is a GM/targeting nuance.

catalog.name: Succubus Form
catalog.triggerDetail: after a Long Rest, can shape-shift into a Succubus stat block
catalog.effectDetail: swaps to a different actor/stat block; equipment not transformed
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM swaps the actor/stat block out of combat
catalog.notes: Out-of-combat stat-block swap; not an in-combat event the card pipeline acts on.

catalog.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
catalog.triggerDetail: while in sunlight, Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls
catalog.effectDetail: conditional Disadvantage on this creature's attacks/checks while in sunlight
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM/pipeline must know whether the creature is currently in sunlight to apply Disadvantage to its own rolls
catalog.notes: Self-affecting roll modifier (not a true 'debuffItem' on an object — closest catalog tag for a roll-disadvantage debuff). Automatable only insofar as the pipeline can apply Disadvantage to this creature's attack rolls once the GM flags sunlight; lighting state isn't something the roll-card pipeline inherently tracks.

catalog.name: Sunlight Weakness
catalog.triggerDetail: While in sunlight
catalog.effectDetail: Disadvantage on D20 Tests while in sunlight
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM must judge whether the creature is in sunlight
catalog.notes: Always-on conditional modifier. 'In sunlight' is an environmental/positional state the pipeline does not track, and disadvantage on all D20 tests is a global roll modifier, not one of the catalog effects. Effect bucketed as debuff/other; no roll-card trigger fits cleanly.

catalog.name: Swallow
catalog.triggerDetail: Dexterity Saving Throw forces swallow on failure
catalog.effectDetail: DC Dex save; on fail target is swallowed (Blinded, Restrained, Total Cover), takes acid damage each turn at start of monster's turns; regurgitate save if it takes 30+ damage
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM picks the target; manual tracking of the swallowed state, the per-turn damage at turnStart, and the 30-damage regurgitation save
catalog.notes: The initiating save + conditions (Blinded, Restrained) are forceSave/condition the pipeline can do. But the ongoing swallowed mechanic (one creature only, recurring start-of-turn damage, conditional 30-damage regurgitation save, escape-from-corpse) is multi-step state the module cannot maintain on its own.

catalog.name: Swarm
catalog.triggerDetail: swarm occupies spaces and can't regain HP
catalog.effectDetail: Space-sharing movement trait + cannot regain HP or gain temp HP
catalog.notes: Static defining trait. No trigger fires; the 'can't regain HP / temp HP' clause is a healing-prevention rule the pipeline doesn't model, and space occupancy is positional. Nothing to automate.

catalog.name: Swarm of Grasping Hands
catalog.triggerDetail: attack roll; conditional damage if swarm is Bloodied
catalog.effectDetail: Attack + damage (reduced damage if swarm Bloodied); Medium-or-smaller target gains Prone
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM confirms target; GM/system decides which damage value applies based on swarm's Bloodied state; GM judges target size for Prone
catalog.notes: Standard attack item → onHit damage and Prone condition are automatable. The Bloodied-dependent damage swap requires knowing the attacker's own HP state (whether it's at/below half), which the damage-applied pipeline tracks for targets but not necessarily for the attacker; Prone gated on target size needs a size check.

catalog.name: Swoop
catalog.triggerDetail: if creature is Grappled, fly half speed and drop it
catalog.effectDetail: Move (fly) without provoking opportunity attacks, then release a grappled creature
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM resolves the flight movement and chooses where to drop the grappled creature
catalog.notes: Pure movement/positioning of the monster plus ending a grapple. The pipeline doesn't move tokens or track grapple relationships, and 'drops that creature' is GM-handled. Movement effect, not automatable here.

catalog.name: Tail

catalog.effectDetail: Attack + damage; size-or-smaller target gains Prone
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM confirms target; size check for Prone application
catalog.notes: Weapon attack item: hit/miss + damage applied, then apply Prone condition on hit (gated by target size). Squarely within onHit → damage + condition pipeline.

catalog.name: Tail Spike
catalog.triggerDetail: attack roll then damage
catalog.effectDetail: Attack + damage only
catalog.notes: Plain weapon attack with damage, no rider. Fully covered by the attack/hit/damage pipeline.

catalog.name: Tail Stinger
catalog.triggerDetail: attack roll then damage
catalog.effectDetail: Attack + damage only
catalog.notes: Plain weapon attack with damage, no rider. Fully covered by the attack/hit/damage pipeline.

catalog.name: Tail Swipe

catalog.effectDetail: Triggers a single Rend attack item
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM invokes the referenced Rend item
catalog.notes: Just redirects to another item (Rend). Whatever Rend does is automatable on its own; this wrapper requires the GM to actually fire the Rend action. Treated as a multiattack/action-redirect.

catalog.name: Talons
catalog.triggerDetail: attack roll then damage
catalog.effectDetail: Attack + damage only
catalog.notes: Plain weapon attack with damage, no rider. Fully covered by the attack/hit/damage pipeline.

catalog.name: Telepathic Bond

catalog.effectDetail: Telepathic communication with master while on same plane
catalog.notes: Pure narrative/communication trait. No roll, no save, no mechanical effect for the pipeline to act on.

catalog.name: Teleport
