catalog.effectDetail: Self teleport to an unoccupied visible space
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM chooses destination space and moves the token
catalog.notes: Self-repositioning. The pipeline doesn't move/place tokens, so the GM must choose the destination and relocate. Teleport effect, GM-driven.

catalog.name: Tentacle
catalog.triggerDetail: attack roll then damage
catalog.effectDetail: Attack + damage; size-or-smaller target gains Grappled (escape DC = passive Athletics)
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM confirms target; size check for Grappled
catalog.notes: Weapon attack: damage on hit plus apply Grappled condition (with a fixed escape DC). Condition application is within the pipeline; the ongoing grapple/escape contest is tracked by Foundry's condition, not this module, but the apply step is automatable.

catalog.name: Tentacle Slam
catalog.triggerDetail: Constitution Saving Throw, half on success
catalog.effectDetail: DC Con save; fail = damage + Stunned until start of monster's next turn; success = half damage
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM confirms targets
catalog.notes: Save-for-half with a condition rider: forceSave, resistance-aware damage, half on success, and Stunned on failure with a defined expiry. All within the save/damage/condition pipeline.

catalog.name: Tentacles
catalog.triggerDetail: attack roll then damage
catalog.effectDetail: Attack + damage; Medium-or-smaller target gains Grappled (escape DC = passive Athletics)
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM confirms target; size check for Grappled
catalog.notes: Weapon attack: damage on hit plus apply Grappled condition with a fixed escape DC. Same shape as Tentacle; the apply step is automatable, ongoing grapple handled by Foundry condition.

catalog.name: Thorn Burst
catalog.triggerDetail: attack roll then damage
catalog.effectDetail: Attack + damage only
catalog.notes: Plain weapon attack with damage, no rider. Fully covered by the attack/hit/damage pipeline.

catalog.name: Thunderbolt
catalog.triggerDetail: attack roll then damage
catalog.effectDetail: Attack + damage; target gains Blinded and Deafened until start of monster's next turn
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM confirms target
catalog.notes: Weapon attack: damage on hit plus Blinded + Deafened with a defined expiry. Both conditions are applyable by the pipeline on hit.

catalog.name: Thunderclap
catalog.triggerDetail: Constitution Saving Throw in a radius Sphere
catalog.effectDetail: DC Con save in an area; fail = damage + Deafened until end of its next turn
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM selects/targets the creatures in the Sphere (AoE template placement)
catalog.notes: Area save: once the GM has targeted the affected tokens, forceSave + damage + Deafened on failure are automatable. The area-template selection of who's in the Sphere is the GM-mediated targeting step.

catalog.name: Thundercloud
catalog.triggerDetail: attack roll then damage
catalog.effectDetail: Attack + damage only
catalog.notes: Plain weapon attack with damage, no rider. Fully covered by the attack/hit/damage pipeline.

catalog.name: Thunderous Bellow
catalog.triggerDetail: Constitution Saving Throw in an area, half on success
catalog.effectDetail: DC Con save in a template; fail = damage + Deafened + Frightened until end of its next turn; success = half damage
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets the creatures in the area template
catalog.notes: Area save-for-half with two condition riders. forceSave, resistance-aware damage, half on success, and Deafened + Frightened on failure are automatable once the GM has targeted the affected tokens.

catalog.name: Thunderous Mace
catalog.triggerDetail: attack roll then damage
catalog.effectDetail: Attack + damage only
catalog.notes: Plain weapon attack with damage, no rider. Fully covered by the attack/hit/damage pipeline.

catalog.name: Thunderous Slam
catalog.triggerDetail: attack roll then damage
catalog.effectDetail: Attack + damage only
catalog.notes: Plain weapon attack with damage, no rider. Fully covered by the attack/hit/damage pipeline.

catalog.name: Touch
catalog.triggerDetail: attack roll then damage; target starts burning
catalog.effectDetail: Attack + damage; creature or flammable unworn object starts burning (ongoing fire)
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM confirms target; GM adjudicates the 'burning' ongoing fire state (no standard SRD condition)
catalog.notes: Damage on hit is fully automatable. 'Starts burning' is not a standard 5.5e condition with a packaged effect, and it applies to flammable objects too, so the GM must adjudicate the ongoing burning. Treated as condition/onHit, partial.

catalog.name: Toxic Ink
catalog.triggerDetail: Constitution Saving Throw in an Emanation while underwater
catalog.effectDetail: DC Con save in an Emanation; fail = Blinded + Poisoned until end of monster's next turn; then monster moves; once per turn
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets creatures in the Emanation; GM judges the underwater precondition; GM resolves the follow-up move; recharge/once-per-turn tracking
catalog.notes: The save + Blinded + Poisoned application is automatable once targets are chosen. But the underwater gate, the subsequent self-move, and the 'can't take this action again until start of its next turn' limiter are GM/state-tracked. No damage; pure condition save.

catalog.name: Training
catalog.triggerDetail: proficiency + Advantage on one skill
catalog.effectDetail: Proficiency and Advantage on ability checks with one DM-chosen skill
catalog.inputsNeeded: DM chooses which skill
catalog.notes: Static self-buff to a chosen skill. The pipeline acts on attacks/saves/damage/conditions, not the creature's own ability-check advantage, and the skill choice is a DM input baked into the statblock. Not triggered by anything the module observes.

catalog.name: Trample
catalog.triggerDetail: Dexterity save vs prone target
catalog.effectDetail: DC Dex save, fail = full damage, success = half; only targets a creature already Prone
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM picks the Prone target within range; GM applies the half-on-success damage split
catalog.notes: Save-for-half damage is standard pipeline. Constraint 'must already be Prone' is a GM-eyeballed targeting requirement the system can't auto-validate, hence partial.

catalog.name: Trampling Charge
catalog.triggerDetail: moves through creatures' spaces, each targeted by Str save
catalog.effectDetail: Str save per creature entered: fail = damage + Prone condition
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM resolves the movement path and which creatures' spaces are entered; then GM targets those tokens for the save
catalog.notes: Movement (no-OoO, through spaces) is GM-mediated; once targets are chosen the save+damage+Prone is fully automatable. Prone is appliable.

catalog.name: Transparent
catalog.triggerDetail: creature must make Perception check to notice the monster
catalog.effectDetail: always-on stealth/detection trait; a DC 15 Wis (Perception) check to notice
catalog.notes: Pure detection/perception fiction. No attacker action, target, hit, save-vs-the-creature, or damage event in the pipeline triggers this. The embedded check is rolled by the observer, not driven by this creature's turn.

catalog.name: Trash Lob
catalog.triggerDetail: attack + damage, target Poisoned until end of its next turn
catalog.effectDetail: weapon attack dealing damage, then applies Poisoned (rider condition)
catalog.notes: Classic weapon-attack item with on-hit condition rider. Pipeline knows attack item, hit confirm, damage, and can apply Poisoned. Fully automatable.

catalog.name: Treasure Sense
catalog.triggerDetail: pinpoint precious metals/stones within 60 ft
catalog.effectDetail: always-on sensory/exploration trait
catalog.notes: Narrative sense ability. No combat trigger, no mechanical effect to apply.

catalog.name: Tree Club
catalog.triggerDetail: attack + damage, Large or smaller target knocked Prone
catalog.effectDetail: weapon attack; on hit a Large-or-smaller creature gets Prone
catalog.notes: On-hit Prone rider. Size gate (Large or smaller) is on the target token and generally checkable; even if GM-confirmed it's a trivial gate. Prone is appliable.

catalog.name: Tree Stride
catalog.triggerDetail: teleports between trees within 60 ft
catalog.effectDetail: self-teleport to unoccupied space near a second tree
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM picks destination space near a valid tree
catalog.notes: Self-movement/teleport with no save, no target, no damage. Pipeline is built around attacker→target→hit/save/damage; relocating the creature's own token to a GM-chosen spot is outside it.

catalog.name: Troll Spawn
catalog.triggerDetail: severed limb may turn into a Troll after 24h (roll 1d12, 12 = Troll)
catalog.effectDetail: delayed spawn of a new Troll actor from a severed limb
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM adjudicates the severed-limb fiction and the 24-hour timer, then spawns the actor
catalog.notes: 24-hour out-of-combat timer plus a GM-placed new actor. The pipeline tracks turn start/end and damage, not multi-day timers or token creation. The 1d12 could be rolled but the summon and timing are GM work.

catalog.name: Tunneler
catalog.triggerDetail: burrows through solid rock, leaves a 10-ft tunnel
catalog.effectDetail: always-on movement/terrain trait (burrow through rock)
catalog.notes: Movement-capability flavor with terrain alteration. No turn-driven trigger or applicable mechanical effect in the pipeline.

catalog.name: Umbral Dagger
catalog.triggerDetail: attack + damage; if reduced to 0 HP, Stable but Poisoned 1h and Paralyzed while Poisoned
catalog.effectDetail: weapon attack; conditional on-kill rider: Stable + Poisoned (1 hr) + Paralyzed-while-Poisoned
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM/system must detect the 'reduced to 0 HP by this attack' branch and the linked Poisoned↔Paralyzed dependency
catalog.notes: Attack+damage core is automatable and damage-applied tells the system if it hit 0 HP. Applying Stable, a 1-hour Poisoned, plus a Paralyzed that's contingent on still having Poisoned is multi-condition chained logic — partial. Conditions themselves are appliable.

catalog.name: Undead Fortitude
catalog.triggerDetail: reduced to 0 HP, Con save DC 5 + damage taken, drops to 1 HP on success
catalog.effectDetail: death-save substitute: Con save (DC scales with damage) unless Radiant or Crit, success = stay at 1 HP
catalog.inputsNeeded: system must compute DC from damage taken and gate on damage-type=Radiant and crit flag
catalog.notes: Pipeline knows damage applied (→ reached 0 HP), damage type (Radiant exclusion), and crit/normal (crit exclusion), and can force a save. DC = 5 + damage taken is dynamic but derivable from the damage event. Forcing the save is easy; auto-restoring to 1 HP on success and suppressing the normal drop-to-0 is the tricky part, hence partial.

catalog.name: Undead Restoration
catalog.triggerDetail: destroyed monster revives in 1d10 days with full HP in a significant location
catalog.effectDetail: delayed self-resurrection (new body) days later
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM adjudicates atonement condition, the 1d10-day timer, and placement of the new body
catalog.notes: Multi-day narrative respawn gated on an 'atones for its evil' story condition. Entirely GM/DM territory; not a turn-driven mechanical effect.

catalog.name: Unicorn's Blessing
catalog.triggerDetail: touches a creature and casts Cure Wounds or Lesser Restoration
catalog.effectDetail: casts Cure Wounds (heal) or Lesser Restoration (condition removal) on a touched creature
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM picks the target and chooses which spell (Cure Wounds vs Lesser Restoration)
catalog.notes: If treated as its own spell-cast items the heal/restoration roll up the dnd5e spell automation. As a single feature it's a branch (which spell) plus target selection. Healing is within the pipeline's apply capabilities; the choice makes it partial.

catalog.name: Unnerving Gaze
catalog.triggerDetail: a creature starts its turn within range and can see the monster
catalog.effectDetail: Wis save on the triggering creature; fail = Frightened until end of its turn, success = 24h immunity
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM confirms line of sight (both can see) and range at that creature's turn start; tracks the 24h immunity
catalog.notes: Pipeline owns turn start, so it can fire the save then. Range + mutual-sight gating and the per-creature 24h immunity flag need help. Save→Frightened is appliable. Partial.

catalog.name: Unsettling Visage
catalog.triggerDetail: Emanation; each creature that can see makes Wis save
catalog.effectDetail: area Wis save: fail = Frightened with repeat-save-at-end-of-turn, auto-succeeds after duration
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM picks which creatures in the Emanation can see the monster; recurring end-of-turn saves and the duration auto-success need tracking
catalog.notes: Multi-target save-vs-Frightened is automatable once targets are chosen, and Frightened is appliable. The ongoing repeat-save and duration-based auto-success is the partial piece. GM targets resolve the see-the-monster gate.

catalog.name: Vampire Weakness
catalog.triggerDetail: 20 Radiant if it starts turn in sunlight; 20 Acid if it ends turn in running water; stake destroys while Incapacitated
catalog.effectDetail: environmental weaknesses: start-of-turn sunlight Radiant, end-of-turn running-water Acid, disadvantage in sunlight, instant-kill stake-to-heart
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM declares whether the monster is in sunlight/running water and resolves the invitation and stake-to-heart conditions
catalog.notes: Bundle of several effects keyed off turn start/end. Pipeline can deal the 20 Radiant/Acid at the right turn boundary IF the GM flags the environment, but sunlight/running-water/invitation/stake are all GM-declared situational states the system can't sense. Partial at best.

catalog.name: Vampiric Connection
catalog.triggerDetail: telepathy with and shared senses for its vampire master
catalog.effectDetail: always-on communication/perception link to the master
catalog.notes: Pure narrative telepathy/shared-senses. No mechanical effect, trigger, or target in the combat pipeline.

catalog.name: Vanish
catalog.triggerDetail: Invisible while concentrating; ends when it attacks or uses Consume Life
catalog.effectDetail: self-applies Invisible (Concentration), ending on attack roll or Consume Life
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM/system tracks Concentration and ends the effect right after the next attack roll or Consume Life use
catalog.notes: Invisible is an appliable condition and self-targeted (no save). The hard part is the auto-end trigger tied to concentration breaking 'immediately after an attack roll' — the pipeline knows when the creature makes an attack, so it could cancel it, but it's bookkeeping rather than a clean apply. Partial.

catalog.name: Verdant Wisp
catalog.triggerDetail: attack + damage, no rider
catalog.effectDetail: plain weapon attack dealing damage
catalog.notes: Vanilla weapon attack item. Attack, hit confirm, resistance-aware damage all handled by the pipeline. Fully automatable.

catalog.name: Vile Appearance
catalog.triggerDetail: creature starts its turn within range and can see the monster's true form
catalog.effectDetail: Wis save; fail = Frightened until start of its next turn, success = 24h immunity
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM confirms the creature can see the monster's true form and is in range; tracks the 24h immunity
catalog.notes: Same shape as Unnerving Gaze: fires on the target's turn start (pipeline owns that), save→Frightened is appliable, but the see-true-form/range gate and 24h immunity need GM/tracking support. Partial.

catalog.name: Vile Slime
catalog.triggerDetail: attack + damage, no rider
catalog.effectDetail: plain weapon attack dealing damage
catalog.notes: Vanilla weapon attack item. Fully automatable by the attack/damage pipeline.

catalog.name: Vine Lash
catalog.triggerDetail: attack + damage, no rider
catalog.effectDetail: plain weapon attack dealing damage
catalog.notes: Vanilla weapon attack item. Fully automatable.

catalog.name: Vine Staff
catalog.triggerDetail: attack + damage, no rider
catalog.effectDetail: plain weapon attack dealing damage
catalog.notes: Vanilla weapon attack item. Fully automatable.

catalog.name: Vortex
catalog.triggerDetail: Con save vs creature in the monster's space; fail = damage + Grappled
catalog.effectDetail: Con save: fail = damage + Grappled (escape DC), then no-Verbal-spells and recurring start-of-turn damage until grapple ends
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM picks the target in the monster's space; tracks the ongoing grapple, the verbal-component restriction, and the recurring start-of-turn damage
catalog.notes: Initial save→damage+Grappled is automatable and Grappled is appliable with the escape DC. The persistent rider (recurring damage at start of the monster's turns + spell restriction until the grapple ends) is ongoing state the pipeline can re-trigger at turnStart but needs grapple-duration tracking. Partial.

catalog.name: War Cry
catalog.triggerDetail: self or one chosen ally gains temp HP and Advantage on attacks
catalog.effectDetail: grants temp HP plus Advantage on attack rolls until the monster's next turn (self or one ally)
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM chooses the recipient (self or one ally that can see/hear it)
catalog.notes: Temp HP is directly appliable by the pipeline; the Advantage buff is a buff effect that can ride along (e.g. an effect/flag) but lasts a duration. Main blocker is the GM target choice and the timed buff, so partial. Primary effect classed as tempHp with a buff rider.

catalog.name: Water Breathing
catalog.triggerDetail: can breathe only underwater; holds breath outside water
catalog.effectDetail: Narrative breathing restriction; no mechanical roll/effect
catalog.notes: Pure environmental/narrative trait. No hit, save, damage, or condition the pipeline touches.

catalog.name: Water Form
catalog.triggerDetail: can enter an enemy's space; squeeze through 1-inch gaps
catalog.effectDetail: Movement permission only — no forced movement or roll
catalog.notes: Movement-rules trait resolved on the canvas/GM. No item, save, or damage in the pipeline.

catalog.name: Water Susceptibility
catalog.triggerDetail: takes 3 (1d6) Cold damage per 5 ft moved in water / per gallon splashed
catalog.effectDetail: 1d6 Cold scaling with distance moved through water
catalog.inputsNeeded: How far the creature moved through water / how much water splashed (sets dice count)
catalog.notes: Damage type is known and applyable, but the trigger (movement through water) isn't something the DDB pipeline observes; GM must supply the distance. Foundry scaling formula exists but needs the input.

catalog.name: Weakening Breath
catalog.triggerDetail: Cone breath; Strength save, repeat save end of each turn
catalog.effectDetail: STR save; fail = Disadvantage on STR tests and -3 (1d6) to damage rolls
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM picks Cone area / targets in it; tracking the recurring end-of-turn save + auto-success after 1 minute
catalog.notes: Pipeline can force the STR save and confirm pass/fail. The 'Disadvantage on STR + -3 damage' debuff is a custom ongoing effect (no standard condition) and the per-turn re-save/duration must be tracked manually.

catalog.name: Web
catalog.triggerDetail: DEX save vs one creature in range; fail = Restrained
catalog.effectDetail: Restrained until the web (AC 10, HP 5) is destroyed
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets the creature
catalog.notes: Pipeline forces DEX save and applies Restrained on fail. Caveat: removal is gated on destroying the web object (tracked separately), so the condition won't auto-clear via a re-save.

catalog.name: Web Strand
catalog.triggerDetail: DEX save vs one Large-or-smaller creature in range; fail = Restrained
catalog.effectDetail: Restrained until the web (AC 10, HP 5) is destroyed
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets the creature (must be Large or smaller)
catalog.notes: Same as Web — force DEX save, apply Restrained on fail. Removal tied to destroying the web object, not a re-save.

catalog.name: Web Walker
catalog.triggerDetail: ignores web movement restrictions; senses creatures on same web
catalog.effectDetail: Immunity to web movement penalties + sense; no roll or applied effect
catalog.notes: Static rules-exemption/awareness trait. Nothing in the hit/save/damage pipeline to drive.

catalog.name: Weight of Years
catalog.triggerDetail: CON save vs one creature in range; fail = +1 Exhaustion level
catalog.effectDetail: Grants 1 Exhaustion level (cosmetic aging is flavor)
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets the creature
catalog.notes: Force CON save, apply/increment Exhaustion on fail. Exhaustion stacking is supported in dnd5e; the recharge-on-next-turn limiter is bookkeeping the GM handles.

catalog.name: Whelm
catalog.triggerDetail: STR save vs each creature in monster's space; fail = damage + Grappled/Restrained
catalog.effectDetail: Damage + Grappled+Restrained+suffocating; ongoing damage at start of monster's turns
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets creatures in the space; track ongoing per-turn damage, escape/pull-out checks, grapple capacity
catalog.notes: Initial STR save + half-on-success damage + Grappled/Restrained are automatable. The recurring start-of-turn damage, suffocation, escape DC checks, and the 'pull out' action are multi-step ongoing state the pipeline can't fully drive.

catalog.name: Whirlwind
catalog.triggerDetail: STR save vs each Medium-or-smaller creature in space; fail = damage + push 20 ft + Prone
catalog.effectDetail: Damage (half on success) + 20 ft push + Prone on fail
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets creatures in space; GM resolves the 20 ft forced push placement
catalog.notes: Force STR save, apply damage (half on success) and Prone on fail — all in pipeline. The forced 20 ft push is movement the GM must execute on the canvas.

catalog.name: Whirlwind of Sand
catalog.triggerDetail: Trigger: monster is hit by an attack roll; +2 AC, teleport, Blind nearby
catalog.effectDetail: +2 AC vs the triggering attack (may cause miss), teleports, Blinds chosen creatures near destination
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM confirms reaction use; GM places teleport destination and chooses which creatures to Blind
catalog.notes: Pipeline sees the onBeingHit trigger and can re-evaluate the +2 AC against the attack and apply Blinded to chosen targets. Teleport destination is a GM-placed move, and the 'each creature of its choice' selection needs GM input.

catalog.name: Wind Swipe
catalog.triggerDetail: weapon attack: /attack then /damage
catalog.effectDetail: Standard weapon attack roll + damage
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets the token(s)
catalog.notes: Plain weapon item — exactly what the DDB attack/hit/damage pipeline handles natively.

catalog.name: Wishes
catalog.triggerDetail: 30% chance to know Wish; can cast on behalf of a non-genie, 3 times then 365-day lockout
catalog.effectDetail: Casts the Wish spell (open-ended effect); usage-limited
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM adjudicates the wish entirely; whether the monster knows Wish
catalog.notes: Wish is fully GM-adjudicated narrative magic with no defined save/hit/damage. The pipeline has nothing concrete to apply.

catalog.name: Withering Sword
catalog.triggerDetail: weapon attack: /attack then /damage
catalog.effectDetail: Standard weapon attack roll + damage
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets the token(s)
catalog.notes: Plain weapon item; the desc carries no rider text, so it's a vanilla attack+damage the pipeline drives directly.

catalog.name: Withering Touch
catalog.triggerDetail: weapon attack: /attack then /damage
catalog.effectDetail: Standard weapon attack roll + damage
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets the token(s)
catalog.notes: Plain weapon item; no rider in desc. Native attack+damage flow.

catalog.name: World-Shaking Movement
catalog.triggerDetail: moves up to Speed, then Emanation shock wave; lose Concentration + Prone if Medium-or-smaller
catalog.effectDetail: Breaks Concentration and applies Prone (Medium-or-smaller) in the emanation; no save
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM resolves the movement and which creatures fall in the emanation area
catalog.notes: No save — auto Prone + Concentration loss to creatures in area. Pipeline can apply Prone and prompt Concentration loss once targets are identified, but the move + emanation area selection is GM/canvas work, and there's no hit/save event to hang it on.

catalog.name: Gnome Cunning
catalog.triggerDetail: advantage on INT/WIS/CHA saves against magic
catalog.effectDetail: Advantage on mental saving throws vs magic
catalog.inputsNeeded: Whether the incoming save is 'against magic' (source-dependent)
catalog.notes: When the pipeline forces an INT/WIS/CHA save it could grant Advantage, but it must know the save source is magical — that's not always encoded, so it's GM-judged.

catalog.name: Damage Transfer
catalog.triggerDetail: while attached, takes half damage; the attached creature takes the other half
catalog.effectDetail: Splits incoming damage 50/50 between monster and the creature it's attached to
catalog.inputsNeeded: Confirm the monster is currently attached and to which creature
catalog.notes: Pipeline knows damage applied and can halve it and redirect the other half to a target, but 'attached to' state and the recipient must be supplied by the GM.

catalog.name: Corrode Metal
catalog.triggerDetail: nonmagical metal weapon that hits the monster corrodes after dealing damage
catalog.effectDetail: -1 cumulative damage penalty to the weapon (destroyed at -5); nonmagical metal ammo destroyed
catalog.inputsNeeded: Confirm the hitting weapon/ammo is nonmagical metal
catalog.notes: Classic onBeingHit-by-weapon → debuffItem (cumulative -1, destroy at -5) plus destroyItem for nonmagical metal ammunition. Pipeline knows the attacker's weapon item and that a hit landed; needs the nonmagical-metal check. Cumulative penalty tracking is the main caveat.

catalog.name: Brave
catalog.triggerDetail: advantage on saves against being Frightened
catalog.effectDetail: Advantage on saves vs the Frightened condition
catalog.inputsNeeded: Whether the forced save is specifically against being Frightened
catalog.notes: If the pipeline forces a save tied to a Frighten effect it can grant Advantage; otherwise it can't tell. Narrow conditional buff.

catalog.name: Labyrinthine Recall
catalog.triggerDetail: can perfectly recall any path it has traveled
catalog.effectDetail: Narrative memory trait; no roll or mechanical effect
catalog.notes: Pure flavor/utility trait. Nothing for the combat pipeline to do.

catalog.name: Steadfast
catalog.triggerDetail: can't be Frightened while it sees an allied creature within 30 ft
catalog.effectDetail: Immunity to Frightened conditioned on a visible ally within 30 ft
catalog.inputsNeeded: Whether a visible allied creature is within 30 ft at the moment Frightened would apply
catalog.notes: Conditional immunity. Pipeline could suppress an incoming Frightened, but the ally-within-30-ft-and-visible condition is positional/GM-judged, not something it tracks.

catalog.name: Reckless
catalog.triggerDetail: at start of turn may gain advantage on melee attacks; attacks against it gain advantage
catalog.effectDetail: Self Advantage on melee attacks in exchange for Advantage to attackers until next turn
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM chooses whether to activate it this turn
catalog.notes: Optional turn-start toggle. Pipeline could apply Advantage to the monster's melee rolls and flag incoming attacks as Advantage, but it's a GM opt-in and the 'attacks against it' side is an effect on every attacker.

catalog.name: Surprise Attack
catalog.triggerDetail: if it surprises a creature and hits in round 1, +7 (2d6) damage
catalog.effectDetail: Extra 2d6 on a hit during the first round vs a surprised target
catalog.inputsNeeded: Confirm the target was surprised and it's round 1 of combat
catalog.notes: Pipeline confirms the hit and can add the 2d6 rider, but whether the target is surprised and it's the first round are conditions the GM must confirm.

catalog.name: Searing Burst
catalog.triggerDetail: DC 23 DEX save in 10-ft radius; 4d6 fire + 4d6 radiant, half on success
catalog.effectDetail: 14 (4d6) fire + 14 (4d6) radiant; half on a successful DEX save
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM chooses which creatures in the 10-ft radius are affected ('of its choice')
catalog.notes: Force DEX save, deal resistance-aware fire+radiant, half on success — all in pipeline. Only nuance is the 'creatures of its choice' selection within the radius.

catalog.name: Chomp
catalog.triggerDetail: makes one bite attack or uses its Swallow
catalog.effectDetail: use one bite attack or the Swallow action
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM picks bite vs Swallow, then resolves chosen action normally
catalog.notes: Legendary/bonus-style action that just invokes another item. Pipeline can resolve the bite/Swallow item once the GM chooses; no independent effect of its own.

catalog.name: Animate Chains
catalog.triggerDetail: up to four chains within 60 ft animate under its control
catalog.effectDetail: create up to 4 controllable chain objects (AC 20, 20 HP) that grapple and add chain attacks on Multiattack
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM chooses which chains animate and their targets/grapples
catalog.notes: Spawns persistent controllable objects with their own stat block, grapple, and Multiattack rider. Outside damage/condition/forceSave scope; needs manual token/object management.

catalog.name: Cast a Spell
catalog.triggerDetail: casts a spell from its prepared list using a slot
catalog.effectDetail: delegates to an arbitrary spell item
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM selects which spell to cast
catalog.notes: Generic 'cast a spell' action. The pipeline is item-driven, so the chosen spell item carries the real effect; this wrapper itself does nothing automatable.

catalog.name: Aggressive
catalog.triggerDetail: as a bonus action, move up to its speed toward a hostile creature
catalog.effectDetail: bonus-action move toward a visible hostile creature
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM moves the token toward the chosen enemy
catalog.notes: Bonus-action repositioning. Pipeline tracks attacker/targets/turns but does not drive token movement or pathing, so this is GM-handled.

catalog.name: Blind Senses
catalog.triggerDetail: can't use blindsight while deafened and unable to smell
catalog.effectDetail: conditional disabling of blindsight (sensory, not mechanical)
catalog.notes: Sense-availability rule. No damage/condition/save the pipeline applies; purely a GM adjudication of detection.

catalog.name: Relentless
catalog.triggerDetail: takes 7 damage or less that would reduce it to 0 HP → reduced to 1 instead
catalog.effectDetail: damage floor at 1 HP (Relentless Endurance-style), recharges on short/long rest
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM confirms not-yet-used since last rest
catalog.notes: Pipeline knows damage applied so it can detect a lethal hit ≤7 and clamp HP to 1, but recharge-per-rest state isn't tracked by it; needs GM/once-per-rest gate.

catalog.name: Adhesive
catalog.triggerDetail: adheres to anything that touches it; Huge or smaller is grappled (escape DC 13, disadvantage)
catalog.effectDetail: apply Grappled to a creature that touches/hits it
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM confirms the toucher is Huge or smaller and within reach
catalog.notes: Grappled is a standard condition the pipeline can apply, but the trigger is 'touches it' (not just a logged hit) plus a size gate and disadvantage-on-escape rider, so it needs GM mediation.

catalog.name: Unarmed Strike (Legendary)
catalog.triggerDetail: makes one unarmed strike
catalog.effectDetail: invokes the unarmed strike attack item once
catalog.notes: Legendary action that just fires the unarmed-strike item. Pipeline resolves that item's hit/damage normally; no separate effect.

catalog.name: Sneak Attack
catalog.triggerDetail: once per turn, +13 (4d6) when it hits with a weapon and has advantage or an ally is adjacent to target
catalog.effectDetail: extra 4d6 weapon damage once per turn under advantage/ally conditions
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM confirms advantage-or-flanking-ally condition and not-yet-used this turn
catalog.notes: Pipeline knows the hit and can add 4d6 of the weapon's damage type, but the advantage/ally precondition and once-per-turn gate require GM confirmation.

catalog.name: Turn Immunity
catalog.triggerDetail: immune to features that turn undead
catalog.effectDetail: immunity to Turn Undead effects
catalog.notes: Passive immunity to a niche effect the pipeline doesn't model. No damage/condition/save to apply.

catalog.name: Stone Golem - Slow
catalog.triggerDetail: targets creatures within 10 ft; DC 17 Wis save or slowed for 1 minute
catalog.effectDetail: DC 17 Wisdom save; on fail: no reactions, speed halved, one attack max, action OR bonus action (1 min, save ends)
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM picks targets in range; ongoing per-turn re-save adjudication
catalog.notes: Forcing the Wis save and reporting pass/fail is fully in scope. Applying the bespoke 'slow' bundle (not a standard 5e condition) and the end-of-turn re-save loop is partial — likely a custom AE flagged for the GM.

catalog.name: Rock Catching
catalog.triggerDetail: if a rock is hurled at it, DC 10 Dex save to catch and take no bludgeoning damage
catalog.effectDetail: negate bludgeoning damage from a thrown rock on a successful Dex save
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM confirms the incoming attack is a thrown rock; resolve the catch save
catalog.notes: Damage-negation reaction. Pipeline knows incoming damage but can't tell that the source is a 'rock or similar object'; the catch save and zeroing the bludgeoning damage would need GM mediation.

catalog.name: Claw Attack
catalog.triggerDetail: makes one claw attack
catalog.effectDetail: invokes the claw attack item once
catalog.notes: Legendary-action wrapper around the claw item; the item's own hit/damage resolution is what the pipeline runs.

catalog.name: Faultless Tracker
catalog.triggerDetail: knows direction/distance to its quarry on the same plane; knows summoner's location
catalog.effectDetail: navigational/tracking knowledge
catalog.notes: Pure narrative/tracking utility. No combat effect, save, or condition for the pipeline to handle.

catalog.name: Ambusher
catalog.triggerDetail: first round of combat: advantage on attacks vs any creature it has surprised
catalog.effectDetail: advantage on attack rolls vs surprised creatures in round 1
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM confirms target was surprised and it's the first round
catalog.notes: Attack-roll advantage rider. The pipeline doesn't track surprise/round number, and granting advantage on the attacker's own roll is upstream of its hit/damage handling, so it's GM-gated.

catalog.name: Vampire Weaknesses
catalog.triggerDetail: 20 acid if it ends its turn in running water; 20 radiant if it starts its turn in sunlight; stake paralysis; can't enter homes uninvited
catalog.effectDetail: recurring environmental damage (running water / sunlight) plus paralysis and entry flaws
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM confirms running water / sunlight / staking circumstances
catalog.notes: Bundle of flaws. The turn-start/turn-end damage ticks could be auto-applied if the GM flags the environmental state, but sunlight disadvantage, the stake paralysis, and the invitation rule are situational adjudications. Mixed; mostly partial.

catalog.name: Invisible Passage
catalog.triggerDetail: magically turns invisible until she attacks or casts a spell or concentration ends
catalog.effectDetail: apply Invisible (with concentration-style duration and no-physical-trace rider)
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM ends it when she attacks/casts or concentration drops
catalog.notes: Invisible is a standard condition the pipeline can apply, but the until-she-attacks/concentration-break end trigger and tracking aren't part of its hit/save flow, so removal is GM-managed.

catalog.name: Move (legendary)
catalog.triggerDetail: moves up to half its speed
catalog.effectDetail: legendary-action half-speed move
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM moves the token
catalog.notes: Pure repositioning legendary action. The pipeline doesn't drive token movement.

catalog.name: Rust Metal
catalog.triggerDetail: nonmagical metal weapon that hits it corrodes; metal ammunition is destroyed
catalog.effectDetail: cumulative -1 damage penalty to the hitting nonmagical metal weapon (destroyed at -5); nonmagical metal ammunition destroyed after dealing damage
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM confirms the weapon/ammo is nonmagical and made of metal
catalog.notes: Directly in the pipeline's debuff/destroy-item wheelhouse on a logged hit by this creature's attacker. Needs GM confirmation of the nonmagical-metal property and tracking the cumulative penalty toward -5; ammunition branch is destroyItem.

catalog.name: Mucous Cloud
catalog.triggerDetail: creature that touches it or hits it with a melee attack within 5 ft makes a DC 14 Con save
catalog.effectDetail: DC 14 Constitution save or diseased 1d4 hours (can breathe only underwater)
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM confirms underwater and the trigger was a touch/melee within 5 ft
catalog.notes: Forcing the Con save on a melee hit and reporting fail is in scope. The resulting 'diseased / breathe only underwater' state is a custom condition, and the underwater/touch precondition needs GM input, so partial.

catalog.name: Assassinate
catalog.triggerDetail: first turn: advantage vs creatures that haven't acted; any hit on a surprised creature is a critical hit
catalog.effectDetail: auto-crit vs surprised targets and advantage on first turn
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM confirms target is surprised / hasn't acted and it's the assassin's first turn
catalog.notes: Pipeline knows hit/crit confirmation, but it doesn't track surprise or first-turn state; forcing the hit to crit and granting advantage are GM-gated on those conditions.

catalog.name: Rejuvenation
catalog.triggerDetail: if it dies, returns to life in 1d6 days with full HP unless a wish prevents it
catalog.effectDetail: full-HP revival 1d6 days after death (narrative)
catalog.notes: Post-death, multi-day narrative recovery. Outside any in-combat tick the pipeline handles; GM/story-level.

catalog.name: Keen Senses
catalog.triggerDetail: advantage on Wis (Perception) checks relying on sight, hearing, or smell
catalog.effectDetail: advantage on Perception checks
catalog.notes: Out-of-combat skill-check advantage. The roll-card pipeline centers on attacks/saves/damage, not ability checks, so no automation.

catalog.name: Change Shape
catalog.triggerDetail: magically polymorphs into a humanoid or beast of equal-or-lower CR, or back
catalog.effectDetail: swap to a new form's statistics (reverts on death)
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM chooses the new form and swaps the stat block
catalog.notes: Whole-actor transformation. The pipeline applies effects/conditions but doesn't replace a creature's stat block; this is a manual actor/token swap.

catalog.name: Antimagic Susceptibility
catalog.triggerDetail: incapacitated in an antimagic field; dispel magic forces a Con save or fall unconscious 1 min
catalog.effectDetail: Incapacitated within antimagic field; on dispel magic, Con save or Unconscious 1 minute
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM confirms antimagic field presence or that dispel magic targeted it
catalog.notes: Incapacitated and Unconscious are standard conditions, and the dispel-magic branch is a forceable save the pipeline could run, but the antimagic-field/dispel triggers aren't things it detects, so it's GM-initiated.

catalog.name: Breath Weapons
catalog.triggerDetail: creature uses one of two breath weapons (fire line / sleep cone)
catalog.effectDetail: DC 18 Dex save vs 13d6 fire (half on success); or DC 18 Con save vs unconscious 10 min
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM picks which breath weapon and targets the affected tokens
catalog.notes: Container feat for a multi-breath monster. Each is a forced save with damage or a condition; pipeline forces the save, applies fire damage (resistance-aware) or the unconscious condition. Sleep ends on damage or wake-action — that follow-on is manual. GM chooses which breath, so partial-pause on selection.

catalog.name: Wall of Ice
catalog.triggerDetail: forms a wall of ice within 60 ft; creatures in its space pushed out and saved
catalog.effectDetail: DC 17 Dex save vs 10d6 cold (half) on formation; DC 17 Con save vs 5d6 cold for moving through frigid air; spawns terrain with its own AC/HP
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM places the wall, chooses which creatures are caught, and which side they end on; tracks the persistent wall/frigid-air terrain and its HP
catalog.notes: The DC 17 Dex save + cold damage at formation is fully automatable. But the wall is a persistent template with its own AC 5 / 30 HP, fire vulnerability, damage immunities, and an ongoing 'finished moving through frigid air' Con save that the pipeline has no movement-through-template trigger for. GM must place and adjudicate.

catalog.name: Tail Swipe (Legendary)
catalog.triggerDetail: makes one tail attack
catalog.effectDetail: legendary action that triggers a single Tail attack item
catalog.notes: Just invokes the creature's Tail attack action. Pipeline already handles a weapon/action item with attack roll, hit/miss, and damage. Effectively a pointer to another item, so the actual on-hit work runs through the normal attack flow.

catalog.name: Regional Effects
catalog.triggerDetail: ambient environmental effects around a legendary creature's region
catalog.effectDetail: boilerplate header; effects end when the creature dies
catalog.notes: Generic SRD boilerplate with no mechanics in this entry. Nothing for the combat-roll pipeline to act on; pure narrative/world effect adjudicated by the GM.

catalog.name: Grasping Tendrils
catalog.triggerDetail: up to six tendrils, each AC 20, 10 HP, can be attacked or broken with DC 15 Str check
catalog.effectDetail: destructible appendages (separate AC/HP objects); no damage to monster when destroyed
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM tracks tendril count/HP and adjudicates the Str check to break one
catalog.notes: Describes sub-objects (tendrils) with their own AC/HP and a Strength-check breakage. The pipeline targets tokens and applies damage to creatures, not to ad-hoc appendages with independent HP pools. No standard trigger; GM-tracked.

catalog.name: Fey Ancestry
catalog.triggerDetail: advantage on saves vs charmed; can't be put to sleep by magic
catalog.effectDetail: save advantage vs charmed; immunity to magical sleep
catalog.notes: Always-on save modifier. If the pipeline forces saves, it could grant advantage vs charm and auto-pass magical sleep — but this monster is the one with the trait, and incoming charm/sleep usually originates from a PC roll, so it depends on whether the engine evaluates saves for this creature. Modeled as a passive buff on its own saves.

catalog.name: Underwater Camouflage
catalog.triggerDetail: advantage on Dex (Stealth) checks while underwater
catalog.effectDetail: advantage on a specific skill check
catalog.notes: Skill-check advantage gated on an environmental condition (underwater). The combat pipeline deals with attacks/saves/damage, not Stealth checks or terrain state, so it's outside scope.

catalog.name: Limited Magic Immunity
catalog.triggerDetail: immune to spells of 6th level or lower; advantage on saves vs all other magic
catalog.effectDetail: spell-level-gated immunity + save advantage vs magical effects
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM judges spell level and whether a source is a spell/magical effect
catalog.notes: Requires knowing the incoming effect's spell level and magical nature, which the roll pipeline (attacker + item + damage) does not track. GM must adjudicate immunity vs advantage case by case.

catalog.name: Detect (Legendary)
catalog.triggerDetail: makes a Wisdom (Perception) check
catalog.effectDetail: ability check, no combat effect
catalog.notes: Legendary action that just rolls a Perception check. Pipeline can roll it as a check, but there's no hit/damage/condition outcome to apply and resolution (does it spot something) is GM-side.

catalog.name: Lair Actions
catalog.triggerDetail: on initiative count 20, uses one lair action option
catalog.effectDetail: boilerplate header; specific options not included in this entry
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM selects the lair action at initiative 20
catalog.notes: Generic lair-action framing with no concrete option text here. Fires on an initiative-count-20 timing the pipeline (turnStart/turnEnd of a creature) doesn't model. Nothing mechanical to automate from this entry alone.

catalog.name: Fey Charm
catalog.triggerDetail: targets one humanoid/beast within 30 ft; DC 14 Wis save or charmed
catalog.effectDetail: applies charmed; repeat save each time monster/allies harm target; lasts 24h
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM picks the target and tracks the charm slot caps (1 humanoid / 3 beasts) and the 24h immunity
catalog.notes: Core action is forceSave (DC 14 Wis) → apply charmed condition, fully in-pipeline. But the recurring 'repeat save whenever harmed' re-trigger, the long 24h duration, the per-target immunity, and the simultaneous-charm caps need GM bookkeeping the roll pipeline won't sustain.

catalog.name: First Roar
catalog.triggerDetail: DC 18 Wis save or frightened 1 minute
catalog.effectDetail: applies frightened; repeat save at end of each turn to end
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets the affected tokens
catalog.notes: Forced Wis save → frightened on fail is squarely in-pipeline. The end-of-turn repeat save is a standard frightened-condition follow-up the pipeline can prompt at each affected creature's turn end. Phase of a multi-stage roar action.

catalog.name: Wakeful
catalog.triggerDetail: when one head sleeps, the other stays awake
catalog.effectDetail: narrative anti-surprise/perception trait
catalog.notes: Flavor/awareness trait for a multi-headed creature with no roll, save, or damage hook. Nothing for the pipeline to do.

catalog.name: Devil Sight
catalog.triggerDetail: magical darkness doesn't impede darkvision
catalog.effectDetail: vision modifier vs magical darkness
catalog.notes: Senses/vision trait. The roll-card pipeline doesn't manage vision or lighting, so it's out of scope (could matter for advantage adjudication but not automatable here).

catalog.name: Shapechanger
catalog.triggerDetail: uses action to polymorph into a Small/Medium humanoid or back
catalog.effectDetail: self-polymorph; stats unchanged except size; reverts on death
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM swaps the token/form
catalog.notes: Self-transformation with no save, attack, or damage. Pipeline can't swap actor forms/tokens; it tracks attacks and damage, not stat-block/size changes. GM-driven.

catalog.name: Duergar Resilience
catalog.triggerDetail: advantage on saves vs poison, spells, illusions, charm, paralysis
catalog.effectDetail: broad save advantage on this creature's saves
catalog.notes: Always-on save advantage. Automatable only insofar as the pipeline evaluates this creature's saves and can tag the relevant categories (poison/charm/paralysis are clear; 'spells'/'illusions' need source classification the pipeline lacks). Modeled as a passive buff.

catalog.name: Elemental Demise
catalog.triggerDetail: on death, body disintegrates leaving only equipment
catalog.effectDetail: cosmetic death effect
catalog.notes: Death-trigger but purely cosmetic (no damage, drops, or mechanics). Pipeline knows death/0 HP but there's nothing mechanical to apply; GM narrates.

catalog.name: Third Roar
catalog.triggerDetail: DC 18 Con save vs 8d10 thunder and prone
catalog.effectDetail: fail: 8d10 thunder + prone; success: half damage, no prone
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets the affected tokens
catalog.notes: Clean forced-save with damage-or-half plus a prone condition on fail — all primitives the pipeline supports (resistance-aware thunder damage + apply prone). Final phase of the roar sequence.

catalog.name: Dark Devotion
catalog.triggerDetail: advantage on saves vs charmed or frightened
catalog.effectDetail: save advantage vs charm/fright on this creature
catalog.notes: Static save-advantage trait. Automatable if the pipeline rolls this creature's saves and can scope advantage to charmed/frightened sources; otherwise GM applies. Passive buff.

catalog.name: Hellish Rejuvenation
catalog.triggerDetail: dies in the Nine Hells, returns to life in 1d10 days unless specific conditions
catalog.effectDetail: delayed full-HP revival 1d10 days later, blocked by good-aligned bless/holy water
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM tracks plane, days elapsed, and whether the death-blocking conditions were met
catalog.notes: Off-combat, multi-day conditional resurrection. Far outside a per-roll combat pipeline — depends on plane, time passage, and narrative conditions the engine doesn't track. GM bookkeeping.

catalog.name: Blasphemous Word
catalog.triggerDetail: non-kin within 10 ft that can hear must make DC 16 Con save
catalog.effectDetail: stunned until end of monster's next turn on fail
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets the creatures within range that can hear
catalog.notes: Forced Con save → stunned condition with a fixed duration (end of monster's next turn). Save + condition are in-pipeline; GM just selects valid targets (within 10 ft, can hear, non-kin). Auto-clear timing is simple.

catalog.name: Horrific Appearance
catalog.triggerDetail: humanoid that starts its turn within 30 ft and sees the hag's true form
catalog.effectDetail: DC 11 Wis save or frightened 1 minute; avert-eyes opt-out; 24h immunity on success
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM confirms line of sight / whether the target averts its eyes, and tracks 24h immunity
catalog.notes: Turn-start forced save → frightened is pipeline-friendly, and the end-of-turn repeat save is standard. But the avert-eyes opt-out (skip the save), the disadvantage-while-in-line-of-sight repeat, and per-target 24h immunity require GM input/tracking. Partial.

catalog.name: Haste
catalog.triggerDetail: Recharge 5-6; +2 AC, advantage on Dex saves, extra attack as bonus action until end of next turn
catalog.effectDetail: self-buff: AC bonus, Dex-save advantage, bonus-action attack
catalog.notes: Self-buff on a 5-6 recharge. The pipeline can track recharge availability, but applying a temporary +2 AC, Dex-save advantage, and an extra bonus-action attack is an active-effect/state change on the creature, not a roll outcome — likely needs effect automation outside the roll card.

catalog.name: Blinding Dust
catalog.triggerDetail: creatures within 5 ft must make DC 16 Con save
catalog.effectDetail: blinded until end of the creature's next turn on fail
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets creatures within 5 ft
catalog.notes: Forced Con save → blinded with a fixed self-clearing duration. Save and condition are pipeline primitives; GM only picks the in-range targets. Straightforward.

catalog.name: Leadership
catalog.triggerDetail: for 1 min, nonhostile ally within 30 ft adds a d4 to an attack roll or save
catalog.effectDetail: grants a +d4 bonus die to allies' attacks/saves; one die at a time; ends if incapacitated
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM decides when to grant the die and to which ally's roll
catalog.notes: Reactive ally buff: the monster chooses to add a d4 to a nonhostile creature's attack roll or save. The pipeline sees attack/save rolls and could append a +d4, but it must pause for the GM's discretionary 'use it now' choice and enforce one-die-at-a-time. Partial.

catalog.name: Angelic Weapons
catalog.triggerDetail: When the monster hits with any weapon
catalog.effectDetail: extra 4d8 radiant damage included in the attack
catalog.notes: On a confirmed weapon hit, pipeline adds 4d8 radiant to damage applied. Also flags weapon attacks as magical (passive bypass), which is informational only.

catalog.name: Tentacle Attack or Fling
catalog.triggerDetail: makes one tentacle attack or uses its Fling
catalog.effectDetail: choose tentacle attack OR Fling action
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM picks tentacle attack vs Fling
catalog.notes: Action-economy chooser referencing other items; pipeline can route the selected attack/Fling item but the choice between them needs GM input.

catalog.name: Children of the Night
catalog.triggerDetail: magically calls 2d4 swarms of bats or rats (or 3d6 wolves outdoors)
catalog.effectDetail: summons beast allies arriving in 1d4 rounds for 1 hour
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM chooses creature type, places summoned tokens, manages delayed arrival/duration
catalog.notes: Summoning is outside the damage/save/condition pipeline; requires manual token placement, environment check (sun/outdoors), delayed arrival and duration tracking.

catalog.name: Freedom of Movement
catalog.triggerDetail: ignores difficult terrain; can't be restrained/slowed by magic
catalog.effectDetail: movement immunities, escape grapple for 5 ft
catalog.notes: Always-on movement/condition immunity. Pipeline doesn't model terrain or grapple/restrain immunity; this is a static defensive trait, not triggered by hit/damage/save.

catalog.name: Two Heads
catalog.triggerDetail: advantage on Perception and on saves vs several conditions
catalog.effectDetail: advantage vs blinded/charmed/deafened/frightened/stunned/unconscious
catalog.notes: Static advantage modifier. Pipeline knows save results but advantage on a save is a roll-time modifier on the targeted creature, not something the attacker-driven card applies. Could grant advantage if the card builds the defender's save.

catalog.name: Enslave
catalog.triggerDetail: DC 14 Wis save or charmed; repeats save when it takes damage
catalog.effectDetail: charm condition on fail; ongoing save-on-damage to end
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets the creature
catalog.notes: Pipeline can force the Wis save and apply charmed on fail. The 'repeat save whenever target takes damage' is automatable via onDamaged re-save, but indefinite duration/control and the once-per-24h distance re-save need manual tracking.

catalog.name: Heal Self
catalog.triggerDetail: magically regains 11 (2d8+2) hit points
catalog.effectDetail: self-heal 2d8+2 HP
catalog.notes: Self-targeted healing action; pipeline applies HP gain directly to the actor.

catalog.name: Innate Spellcasting
catalog.triggerDetail: innately casts listed spells (Cha-based)
catalog.effectDetail: spell list with usage frequencies (at-will / 3-day / 1-day)
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM chooses which spell to cast and resolves it
catalog.notes: Each spell has its own effects/targets/saves; this feature is just the spell list and ability. Casting is a separate item per spell, not resolvable by the card itself.

catalog.name: Heated Weapons
catalog.triggerDetail: When it hits with a metal melee weapon
catalog.effectDetail: extra 1d6 fire damage included in the attack
catalog.notes: On confirmed melee hit with a metal weapon, add 1d6 fire to applied damage. Pipeline knows the weapon item and the hit; 'metal' qualifier is generally true for the creature's listed weapons.

catalog.name: Heated Body
catalog.triggerDetail: creature that touches it or hits with a melee attack within 5 ft
catalog.effectDetail: 5 (1d10) fire damage to the attacker
catalog.notes: Reactive retaliation: when this creature is hit by a melee attack, deal 1d10 fire back to the attacker. Pipeline knows attacker + onBeingHit and can apply resistance-aware damage to them. Pure-touch (non-attack) case needs manual trigger.

catalog.name: Variable Illumination
catalog.triggerDetail: sheds bright/dim light, radius adjustable as bonus action
catalog.effectDetail: emits light in 5-20 ft radius
catalog.notes: Lighting/token-light effect, not in the damage/save/condition pipeline. Belongs to token vision/lighting config.

catalog.name: Tail Spike Regrowth
catalog.triggerDetail: used spikes regrow on a long rest
catalog.effectDetail: ammunition/resource recovery on long rest
catalog.notes: Long-rest resource bookkeeping (24 tail spikes). Pipeline is turn/combat-scoped; long-rest recovery is out of scope.

catalog.name: Stone Camouflage
catalog.triggerDetail: advantage on Stealth checks to hide in rocky terrain
catalog.effectDetail: advantage on Dex (Stealth) in rocky terrain
catalog.notes: Situational skill-check advantage; Stealth checks aren't part of the attack/save/damage pipeline.

catalog.name: Enlarge
catalog.triggerDetail: for 1 minute becomes Large, doubles weapon damage dice
catalog.effectDetail: size increase + doubled Str-weapon damage dice + advantage on Str checks/saves
catalog.notes: Damage-dice doubling could be reflected when the card rolls this creature's Str weapon attacks while active, but size change, token scaling, and duration tracking are outside the pipeline. Best as a manual buff toggle.

catalog.name: Snow Camouflage
catalog.triggerDetail: advantage on Stealth checks to hide in snowy terrain
catalog.effectDetail: advantage on Dex (Stealth) in snowy terrain
catalog.notes: Situational skill-check advantage, same class as Stone Camouflage; not in the pipeline.

catalog.name: Grappler
catalog.triggerDetail: advantage on attack rolls vs creatures grappled by it
catalog.effectDetail: advantage on attacks against creatures it has grappled
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM confirms target is grappled by this creature
catalog.notes: Attack-roll advantage is conditional on the grappled-by-this-creature state, which the pipeline doesn't track. Could be applied if GM flags the target as grappled, otherwise manual.

catalog.name: Web Sense
catalog.triggerDetail: knows location of creatures in contact with the same web
catalog.effectDetail: sensory awareness via web
catalog.notes: Pure sensory/information trait; no roll, save, damage, or condition to apply.

catalog.name: False Appearance
catalog.triggerDetail: while motionless, indistinguishable from a suit of armor
catalog.effectDetail: disguise while motionless
catalog.notes: Narrative/disguise trait; nothing for the pipeline to compute or apply.

catalog.name: Horrifying Visage
catalog.triggerDetail: DC 13 Wis save or frightened 1 min; fail by 5+ also ages target
catalog.effectDetail: frightened on fail; aging on fail-by-5+; save repeats end of turn
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets viewers in range; resolves aging side effect
catalog.notes: Pipeline forces the Wis save and applies frightened on fail. End-of-turn re-saves are automatable. The aging-by-1d4x10-years on fail-by-5 and the 24h immunity are narrative bookkeeping the GM handles.

catalog.name: Divine Eminence
catalog.triggerDetail: bonus action expend spell slot: melee attacks deal +3d6 radiant
catalog.effectDetail: adds extra radiant damage to melee hits until end of turn, scaling with slot
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM chooses spell slot level (scales +1d6 per level above 1st)
catalog.notes: Once activated, the bonus radiant damage on a hit is added via onHit, but the activation requires choosing/expending a spell slot and the amount scales with slot level, so the card needs the slot-level input to know the dice.

catalog.name: Second Roar
catalog.triggerDetail: DC 18 Wis save or deafened and frightened 1 min
catalog.effectDetail: deafened + frightened (paralyzed while frightened); end-of-turn re-save
catalog.inputsNeeded: GM targets affected creatures
catalog.notes: Pipeline can force the Wis save and apply deafened+frightened on fail, with end-of-turn re-saves. Note the unusual 'frightened creature is paralyzed' rider — applying paralyzed too is automatable but worth flagging.

catalog.name: Sure-Footed
catalog.triggerDetail: advantage on Str/Dex saves vs being knocked prone
catalog.effectDetail: advantage on saves against prone
catalog.notes: Static save-advantage modifier on the defender. Pipeline sees save results but doesn't roll this creature's saves; only relevant if a card builds the defender's prone save.

catalog.name: Magic Weapons
catalog.triggerDetail: the monster's weapon attacks are magical
catalog.effectDetail: weapon attacks count as magical for resistance/immunity bypass
catalog.notes: Static flag: when computing resistance-aware damage on this creature's weapon hits, treat as magical so nonmagical resistance doesn't apply. Pipeline already does resistance-aware damage, so this just sets the magical bypass.

catalog.name: Reaping Scythe
catalog.triggerDetail: sweeps spectral scythe through a creature within 5 ft
catalog.effectDetail: 7 (1d8+3) slashing plus 4 (1d8) necrotic
catalog.notes: Essentially an attack/damage action with two damage types. Pipeline rolls and applies resistance-aware slashing + necrotic to the GM-targeted creature on a hit.

catalog.name: Turn Defiance
catalog.triggerDetail: it and nearby ghouls have advantage on saves vs turn undead
catalog.effectDetail: advantage on saves against turn-undead effects
catalog.notes: Aura-like save advantage against a narrow effect (turn undead). Not triggered by the standard hit/damage/save pipeline; situational and rarely relevant to it.

catalog.name: Brute
catalog.triggerDetail: when the monster hits with a melee weapon
catalog.effectDetail: one extra die of the weapon's damage (included in the attack)
catalog.notes: Static extra damage die on a hit. The desc says 'included in the attack', so the DDB item's damage formula likely already bakes it in — the card would just deal whatever damage the item rolls. If the bonus die is NOT in the item, the pipeline still knows the weapon's damage type and can add one die on hit confirmation.

catalog.name: Intoxicating Touch
catalog.triggerDetail: Melee Spell Attack ... Hit: target is magically cursed for 1 hour
catalog.effectDetail: applies a custom 'cursed' state: disadvantage on Wisdom saves and all ability checks for 1 hour
catalog.notes: It's a +5 melee spell attack the pipeline can resolve on hit. The effect is not a standard 5e condition (no built-in 'cursed' status), so the module can apply a timed Active Effect granting disadvantage on Wis saves + ability checks, but enforcing that disadvantage during later rolls depends on the AE actually modifying rolls. Tracking/applying the marker is automatable; mechanical enforcement is partial.

catalog.name: Healing Touch
catalog.triggerDetail: the monster touches another creature
catalog.effectDetail: target regains 20 (4d8+2) HP and is freed from any curse, disease, poison, blindness, or deafness
catalog.inputsNeeded: Which ally/creature to target with the touch (GM picks the recipient)
catalog.notes: Healing roll and HP application are fully automatable. Removing curse/disease/poison/blinded/deafened requires identifying and stripping those specific conditions/effects from the target — doable if they're tracked as Active Effects, but the GM must choose the target and the cleanup of arbitrary curses/diseases is best GM-confirmed.

catalog.name: Turn Resistance
catalog.triggerDetail: advantage on saves against effects that turn undead
catalog.effectDetail: advantage on saving throws vs turn undead effects
catalog.notes: Always-on modifier to a narrow class of saves (turn undead). The pipeline doesn't originate Turn Undead saves and can't generally tell which save is 'a turn-undead effect', so it can't auto-grant the advantage. Passive flavor/defense, out of pipeline scope.

catalog.name: Echolocation
catalog.triggerDetail: can't use blindsight while deafened
catalog.effectDetail: conditional loss of blindsight sense when deafened
catalog.notes: A sensory restriction (blindsight disabled while deafened). No damage/condition/save the card pipeline produces; it's a perception/GM-adjudication detail outside the hit/damage/save loop.

catalog.name: Legendary Actions
catalog.triggerDetail: only at the end of another creature's turn; regains at start of its turn
catalog.effectDetail: resource economy: 3 legendary actions, refresh at start of turn
catalog.inputsNeeded: Which legendary action option to use, and whether to use one at all (GM choice)
catalog.notes: The pipeline knows turn start/end, so it could prompt the GM at end-of-turn and track/reset a legendary-action budget. But the actual options aren't defined here and choosing/resolving them is GM-driven — this is action-economy bookkeeping, not a discrete effect.

catalog.name: Unnerving Mask
catalog.triggerDetail: when a creature starts its turn within 30 feet and can see the monster
catalog.effectDetail: DC 14 Wis save or Frightened until the end of that creature's turn
catalog.inputsNeeded: Confirm the starting creature is within 30 ft AND can see the monster (range/line-of-sight is a GM call)
catalog.notes: Pipeline fires on turnStart and can force the DC 14 Wis save and apply Frightened (standard condition, end-of-turn duration) on failure. The range/visibility gate is the manual part — module can prompt the GM to confirm the trigger applies, then auto-resolve the save and condition.

catalog.name: Hellish Weapons
catalog.triggerDetail: weapon attacks are magical and deal extra poison damage on a hit (included)
catalog.effectDetail: +13 (3d8) poison damage on a hit; attacks count as magical
catalog.notes: Static bonus poison damage on a weapon hit. 'Included in the attacks' suggests the DDB item already carries the rider; if so the card deals it automatically with correct type. Magical-attack property matters only for the target's resistances, which the resistance-aware damage step handles.

catalog.name: Aversion of Fire
catalog.triggerDetail: if the monster takes fire damage
catalog.effectDetail: disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks until end of its next turn
catalog.notes: Pipeline knows damage applied AND its type, so it can detect fire damage to this creature and flag the debuff. Applying it as a timed Active Effect (disadvantage on attacks + ability checks until end of next turn) is feasible; full mechanical enforcement of that disadvantage on subsequent rolls is the partial bit, and it self-inflicts so no target choice needed.

catalog.name: Limited Telepathy
catalog.triggerDetail: transmit simple messages/images to creatures within 120 ft that understand a language
catalog.effectDetail: one-way telepathic communication
catalog.notes: Pure communication ability — no roll, damage, condition, or save. Entirely narrative/GM roleplay, nothing for the card pipeline to do.

catalog.name: Tentacle Disease
catalog.triggerDetail: after 1 minute the diseased creature is afflicted; later periodic acid damage
catalog.effectDetail: delayed disease: can't regain HP unless underwater; 6 (1d12) acid damage every 10 min when out of water; removable only by heal or 6th-level+ disease cure
catalog.inputsNeeded: Whether moisture was applied to the skin within 10 minutes (negates the recurring acid damage); tracking the 1-minute onset and 10-minute real-time intervals
catalog.notes: Delayed, real-time/minute-based disease with conditional negation (moisture) and narrative cure requirements. The recurring acid tick happens off the combat turn cycle, and onset/negation are GM-narrated. The card could apply a 'no HP regain' marker, but the recurring damage and conditions fall outside the turn-based, hit/save-driven pipeline.

catalog.name: Shield
catalog.triggerDetail: when a creature makes an Attack against the wearer of the monster's Amulet, within 5 ft
catalog.effectDetail: +2 AC bonus to the amulet wearer while the monster is within 5 ft (a Shield-spell-like reaction)
catalog.inputsNeeded: Whether the monster is within 5 ft of the wearer; whether to grant the bonus (and possibly turn a hit into a miss)
catalog.notes: This is a defensive reaction that protects a DIFFERENT creature (the amulet wearer), granting +2 AC. The pipeline confirms hit/miss against the targeted creature but doesn't model a third-party AC-boosting reaction or recompute the attack against a higher AC; range gating is also a GM call. Out of scope as written.

catalog.name: Two-Headed
catalog.triggerDetail: advantage on Wis (Perception) and on saves vs blinded/charmed/deafened/frightened/stunned/unconscious
catalog.effectDetail: advantage on Perception and on saves against six conditions
catalog.notes: Always-on advantage on a category of saves and a skill check. The pipeline forces saves but doesn't originate this creature's defensive saves with awareness of which condition is at stake, so it can't auto-grant the advantage. Best handled as a passive Active Effect on the actor, outside the card flow.

catalog.name: Martial Advantage
catalog.triggerDetail: once per turn, hits a creature with a weapon attack while it's within 5 ft of a non-incapacitated ally
catalog.effectDetail: +7 (2d6) extra damage on a qualifying weapon hit, once per turn
catalog.inputsNeeded: Confirm a non-incapacitated ally of the monster is within 5 ft of the target (positioning is a GM call); enforce once-per-turn
catalog.notes: Pipeline knows the hit and can roll/apply the 2d6 extra damage with the weapon's type. The conditional (ally adjacency to target, ally not incapacitated) is positional and needs GM confirmation, and once-per-turn must be tracked. So prompt-then-apply: partial.
